CHANGELOG.md:list:11621501ea8bcfaddd39ec.source: **记忆系统**：常驻记忆（core/normal 分层）按平台与 actor 注入；长期记忆基于 Markdown 源数据与 SQLite FTS 检索。
CHANGELOG.md:list:11621501ea8bcfaddd39ec.translation: **Memory System**: Resident memory (core/normal layers) injected by platform and actor; long-term memory based on Markdown source data and SQLite FTS retrieval.

CHANGELOG.md:list:124caf0d7cc91f9b2ff6fa.source: **多平台适配**：CLI（含 client/server 分离与远程连接）、QQ OneBot v11、QQ 官方机器人、Telegram Bot API。
CHANGELOG.md:list:124caf0d7cc91f9b2ff6fa.translation: **Multi-platform adapter**: CLI (including client/server separation and remote connection), QQ OneBot v11, QQ Official Bot, Telegram Bot API.

CHANGELOG.md:list:14cd896f3e686f14895d68.source: 接口、配置与内部实现仍可能调整，更适合作为个人 Agent/bot 框架探索使用。
CHANGELOG.md:list:14cd896f3e686f14895d68.translation: Interfaces, configurations, and internal implementations may still be adjusted; it is more suitable for exploratory use as a personal Agent/bot framework.

CHANGELOG.md:list:18f8686c3e2512c85d4545.source: Provider 新增 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 字段，支持 HTTP/SOCKS5 代理。
CHANGELOG.md:list:18f8686c3e2512c85d4545.translation: Added __ELBOT_CODE_0__ field to Provider, supporting HTTP/SOCKS5 proxies.

CHANGELOG.md:list:280823f9e19a44bcbfe925.source: **工具发现机制**：默认只暴露 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 与工具名，按需注入完整 schema，减少无效上下文开销。
CHANGELOG.md:list:280823f9e19a44bcbfe925.translation: **Tool Discovery Mechanism**: By default, only __ELBOT_CODE_0__ and the tool name are exposed, with the full schema injected on demand to reduce unnecessary context overhead.

CHANGELOG.md:list:31e1b19552361d185e8896.source: Provider 配置重构：删除未使用的 __ELBOT_CODE_0__，删除 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 全局模型窗口表；
CHANGELOG.md:list:31e1b19552361d185e8896.translation: Provider configuration refactoring: removed unused __ELBOT_CODE_0__, removed __ELBOT_CODE_1__ global model window table;

CHANGELOG.md:list:36d8eefabd86733235aa77.source: 多处匹配时可通过 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 选择第几处，未传 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 报错并列出所有匹配位置。
CHANGELOG.md:list:36d8eefabd86733235aa77.translation: When there are multiple matches, the specific match can be selected via __ELBOT_CODE_0__; if __ELBOT_CODE_1__ is not provided, an error will be reported and all matching positions will be listed.

CHANGELOG.md:list:3bfc1afeffc284a26448c1.source: **日志与审计**：运行日志、审计日志与 Elnis 日志分离，支持结构化字段与按日期轮转。
CHANGELOG.md:list:3bfc1afeffc284a26448c1.translation: **Logs and Audit**: Runtime logs, audit logs, and Elnis logs are separated, supporting structured fields and date-based rotation.

CHANGELOG.md:list:5ba1e7bae3138806db3d56.source: **Hook Layer**：在 Agent 输入、LLM 请求/响应、平台发送等关键点插入扩展逻辑；内置规则 Hook、表情 Hook 与常驻记忆 Hook。
CHANGELOG.md:list:5ba1e7bae3138806db3d56.translation: **Hook Layer**: Insert extension logic at key points such as Agent input, LLM request/response, and platform sending; built-in rule Hooks, emoji Hooks, and resident memory Hooks.

CHANGELOG.md:list:6970168418b00124c98288.source: 兼容 agentskills.io 风格外置 AgentSkill（附带 Python 脚本）。
CHANGELOG.md:list:6970168418b00124c98288.translation: Compatible with agentskills.io style external AgentSkills (accompanied by Python scripts).

CHANGELOG.md:list:714c6568883b5a6b6d519a.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 工具风险等级由 high 降为 medium。
CHANGELOG.md:list:714c6568883b5a6b6d519a.translation: The risk level of the __ELBOT_CODE_0__ tool has been downgraded from high to medium.

CHANGELOG.md:list:74cc70f1fc05110e376f89.source: MCP 工具、子 Agent 与完整多模态（语音、视频、文件真实模型输入）尚未实现。
CHANGELOG.md:list:74cc70f1fc05110e376f89.translation: MCP tools, sub-Agents, and full multimodality (actual model input for voice, video, and files) are not yet implemented.

CHANGELOG.md:list:7500a6bebabf3901013682.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 的 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 操作新增 __ELBOT_CODE_2__ 与 __ELBOT_CODE_3__ 参数：__ELBOT_CODE_4__ 时按单行前缀匹配整行（容忍行首缩进，规避换行符匹配出错），__ELBOT_CODE_5__（默认）保持精确子串语义；
CHANGELOG.md:list:7500a6bebabf3901013682.translation: Added __ELBOT_CODE_2__ and __ELBOT_CODE_3__ parameters to the __ELBOT_CODE_1__ operation of __ELBOT_CODE_0__: when __ELBOT_CODE_4__, it matches the entire line by single-line prefix (tolerating leading indentation to avoid newline character matching errors); __ELBOT_CODE_5__ (default) maintains exact substring semantics.

CHANGELOG.md:list:7d4eb6c7f9421281249ea4.source: **轻量内核**：Go 实现，本地启动 <10ms，常驻内存约 30MB。
CHANGELOG.md:list:7d4eb6c7f9421281249ea4.translation: **Lightweight Core**: Implemented in Go, local startup <10ms, resident memory approximately 30MB.

CHANGELOG.md:list:7d9ce7afaf8c80361c3a68.source: **安全策略**：工具风险分级、角色权限校验、高风险确认流程与后台 shell 轻量沙盒。
CHANGELOG.md:list:7d9ce7afaf8c80361c3a68.translation: **Security Policy**: Tool risk grading, role permission verification, high-risk confirmation workflows, and a lightweight background shell sandbox.

CHANGELOG.md:list:7efdca0726c1f3e11a9edd.source: **ELyph Task Notation**：结构化任务描述语言，用于 LLM Cron 与原生 Skill，减少自然语言歧义。
CHANGELOG.md:list:7efdca0726c1f3e11a9edd.translation: **ELyph Task Notation**: A structured task description language used for LLM Cron and native Skills to reduce natural language ambiguity.

CHANGELOG.md:list:83aa655090903e728d1214.source: **原生与外置 Skill**：__ELBOT_CODE_0__ 元工具支持 LLM 创建原生 EL Skill（纯 ELyph 或附带 Go 源码并编译）；
CHANGELOG.md:list:83aa655090903e728d1214.translation: **Native and External Skills**: The __ELBOT_CODE_0__ meta-tool supports LLMs in creating native EL Skills (pure ELyph or accompanied by Go source code and compiled);

CHANGELOG.md:list:8e240be846787f791774d6.source: 模型级 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 和 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 统一收到 __ELBOT_CODE_2__ 下，按 __ELBOT_CODE_3__ 查找，避免跨 provider 同名模型冲突。
CHANGELOG.md:list:8e240be846787f791774d6.translation: Model-level __ELBOT_CODE_0__ and __ELBOT_CODE_1__ are now unified under __ELBOT_CODE_2__ and looked up by __ELBOT_CODE_3__, avoiding conflicts between models with the same name across providers.

CHANGELOG.md:list:92385f55b6d2a02dc7846f.source: **Chat/Work 双模式**：chat 模式关闭工具，适合日常聊天与低成本对话；work 模式启用工具发现与调用，两模式可独立配置模型。
CHANGELOG.md:list:92385f55b6d2a02dc7846f.translation: **Chat/Work Dual Mode**: chat mode disables tools, suitable for daily chatting and low-cost conversations; work mode enables tool discovery and invocation; models can be configured independently for both modes.

CHANGELOG.md:list:ada87970eec02cf839ea0c.source: LLM 建连/HTTP 可重试失败时通过 Notice 显示当前重试次数。
CHANGELOG.md:list:ada87970eec02cf839ea0c.translation: Display the current retry count via Notice when LLM connection/HTTP retriable requests fail.

CHANGELOG.md:list:b38bc9c4a4c1c59fabd0af.source: LLM Cron 用 ELyph 任务描述驱动模型执行，支持一次性与周期任务、missed 补跑与广播。
CHANGELOG.md:list:b38bc9c4a4c1c59fabd0af.translation: LLM Cron uses ELyph task descriptions to drive model execution, supporting one-time and periodic tasks, missed run recovery, and broadcasting.

CHANGELOG.md:list:b6c52e63dbdbc933d90f2f.source: 修复 OpenAI-compatible 流式响应中途断开但缺失 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 时被当作正常结束的问题；现在会明确通知 LLM 响应中断。
CHANGELOG.md:list:b6c52e63dbdbc933d90f2f.translation: Fixed an issue where OpenAI-compatible streaming responses that disconnected midway but were missing __ELBOT_CODE_0__ were treated as normal terminations; now it will explicitly notify that the LLM response was interrupted.

CHANGELOG.md:list:bd93eae9bd1763e2908b37.source: **标准 Cron 与 LLM Cron**：标准 Cron 按计划直发固定内容；
CHANGELOG.md:list:bd93eae9bd1763e2908b37.translation: **Standard Cron and LLM Cron**: Standard Cron sends fixed content directly according to a schedule;

CHANGELOG.md:list:cb42950d3097afb350e027.source: **SQLite 持久化**：Session、消息、上下文摘要、工具调用记录、Cron job、Elnis 事件统一存储。
CHANGELOG.md:list:cb42950d3097afb350e027.translation: **SQLite Persistence**: Unified storage for Sessions, messages, context summaries, tool call records, Cron jobs, and Elnis events.

CHANGELOG.md:list:ce3e9cc6dd15510c9cfe7d.source: **Elnis 监听枢纽**：接收 Elwisp 通过 Elvena HTTP 协议投递的外部事件，支持 record/direct/llm 三种模式与多目标投递。
CHANGELOG.md:list:ce3e9cc6dd15510c9cfe7d.translation: **Elnis listening hub**: Receives external events delivered by Elwisp via the Elvena HTTP protocol, supporting three modes (record/direct/llm) and multi-target delivery.

CHANGELOG.md:list:e674fa7fc18af87b45660d.source: **Session 服务**：持久化会话，支持恢复、归档、置顶、Fork、删除、分页与平台隔离；长对话自动上下文压缩。
CHANGELOG.md:list:e674fa7fc18af87b45660d.translation: **Session Service**: Persistent sessions supporting recovery, archiving, pinning, Forking, deletion, pagination, and platform isolation; automatic context compaction for long conversations.

CHANGELOG.md:paragraph:f4fdd49cee5a89753.source: ElBot 的首个预发布版本。轻量 Agent/Chatbot 框架，目标是个人助手、平台机器人与可编排的自动化助手。
CHANGELOG.md:paragraph:f4fdd49cee5a89753.translation: The first pre-release version of ElBot. A lightweight Agent/Chatbot framework aimed at personal assistants, platform bots, and orchestratable automation assistants.

README.zh-CN.md:list:1c8a896e97426f53447.source: 在 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 选择默认 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ / __ELBOT_CODE_2__ 模式和模型。
README.zh-CN.md:list:1c8a896e97426f53447.translation: Select the default __ELBOT_CODE_1__ / __ELBOT_CODE_2__ mode and model in __ELBOT_CODE_0__.

README.zh-CN.md:list:d8e6836fadf4090ff0e.source: 启动后输入 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 查看命令，或直接开始对话。
README.zh-CN.md:list:d8e6836fadf4090ff0e.translation: After starting, enter __ELBOT_CODE_0__ to view commands, or start a conversation directly.

README.zh-CN.md:list:de66a81bf5bf9dfb8d9.source: 通过系统环境变量或配置目录 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 设置 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 对应的 API Key。
README.zh-CN.md:list:de66a81bf5bf9dfb8d9.translation: Set the API Key corresponding to __ELBOT_CODE_1__ via system environment variables or the configuration directory __ELBOT_CODE_0__.

README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:00c6ed6fb91579.source: **安全策略与风险确认。** 工具系统内置风险等级、角色权限判断和高风险确认流程。普通用户只能发现和调用低风险工具；超级管理员调用高风险工具时也需逐项确认。
README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:00c6ed6fb91579.translation: **Security policies and risk confirmation.** The tool system has built-in risk levels, role permission judgments, and high-risk confirmation workflows. Ordinary users can only discover and call low-risk tools; superadmins must also confirm each item when calling high-risk tools.

README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:034b3aa1227601.source: **会话、Fork 与上下文压缩**： 内置持久化 Session 服务，支持会话恢复、归档、置顶、Fork、删除、分页查看和平台隔离。
README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:034b3aa1227601.translation: **Session, Fork, and Context Compaction**: Built-in persistent Session service, supporting Session recovery, archiving, pinning, Forking, deletion, paginated viewing, and platform isolation.

README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:044b1197e356e6.source: 传统 Agent 通常只会等待用户输入；Cron 只能响应时间。Elnis 让 ElBot 多了一种触发方式：外部事件。
README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:044b1197e356e6.translation: Traditional Agents usually only wait for user input; Cron can only respond to time. Elnis provides ElBot with another trigger method: external events.

README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:050f455498260e.source: 详细说明见 [Elnis 监听枢纽](docs/elnis.md)。
README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:050f455498260e.translation: For detailed information, see [Elnis Listening Hub](docs/elnis.md).

README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:056ad2dcfd51e4.source: ElBot 引入 ELyph Task Notation，用于描述 LLM Cron 与原生 skill。
README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:056ad2dcfd51e4.translation: ElBot introduces ELyph Task Notation to describe LLM Cron and native Skills.

README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:06c76ed0348157.source: 相比全自动 RAG 或图检索长期记忆，ElBot 的记忆设计更显式、更可控。
README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:06c76ed0348157.translation: Compared to fully automated RAG or graph-based long-term memory retrieval, ElBot's memory design is more explicit and controllable.

README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:0ca67064421a15.source: 工具执行自带 sandbox context，artifact 文件暂存于隔离目录，避免影响系统文件。
README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:0ca67064421a15.translation: Tool execution comes with its own sandbox context, and artifact files are temporarily stored in an isolated directory to avoid affecting system files.

README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:0f92def088eb83.source: 开发计划和任务拆分已移到 [devdocs](devdocs/)。
README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:0f92def088eb83.translation: Development plans and task breakdowns have been moved to [devdocs](devdocs/).

README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:11714de60718b7.source: ElBot 引入 ELyph Task Notation（任务表示法），用于描述 LLM Cron 与原生 skill。
README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:11714de60718b7.translation: ElBot introduces ELyph Task Notation (Task Notation) to describe LLM Cron and native skills.

README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:167044ec2caf4b.source: ElBot 内置 Cron Runtime 和 LLM 可编排 Cron 服务。
README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:167044ec2caf4b.translation: ElBot has a built-in Cron Runtime and an LLM-orchestratable Cron service.

README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:1677ecaba5eccf.source: 新增用户可见功能时，优先更新对应专题文档。
README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:1677ecaba5eccf.translation: When adding user-visible features, prioritize updating the corresponding topic documentation.

README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:16ca720529c5f4.source: 参考：Chatterji et al., *How People Use ChatGPT*, NBER, 2025；
README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:16ca720529c5f4.translation: Reference: Chatterji et al., *How People Use ChatGPT*, NBER, 2025;

README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:179892a297c6b7.source: 长对话自动触发上下文压缩，保持窗口可控，压缩后可继续正常对话。
README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:179892a297c6b7.translation: Long conversations automatically trigger context compaction to keep the window controllable; normal conversation can continue after compaction.

README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:1f060a9dccfc97.source: **安全策略与风险确认**： 工具系统内置风险等级、角色权限判断和高风险确认流程。普通用户只能发现和调用低风险工具；超级管理员调用高风险工具时也需逐项确认。
README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:1f060a9dccfc97.translation: **Security Policies and Risk Confirmation**: The tool system has built-in risk levels, role permission checks, and high-risk confirmation processes. Regular users can only discover and invoke low-risk tools; even superadmins must confirm each item when invoking high-risk tools.

README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:21da0415c7211d.source: **可扩展的 Hook 系统**： ElBot 内置 Hook Layer，可在 Agent 输入、LLM 请求、LLM 响应、平台发送、平台连接等关键事件点插入扩展逻辑。
README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:21da0415c7211d.translation: **Extensible Hook system**: ElBot has a built-in Hook Layer, allowing extension logic to be inserted at key event points such as Agent input, LLM request, LLM response, platform sending, and platform connection.

README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:246ec34cebfa3d.source: ElBot 内置 Hook Layer，可在 Agent 输入、LLM 请求、LLM 响应、平台发送、平台连接等关键事件点插入扩展逻辑。
README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:246ec34cebfa3d.translation: ElBot has a built-in Hook Layer, allowing extension logic to be inserted at key event points such as Agent input, LLM request, LLM response, platform sending, and platform connection.

README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:24704b37f4f5b1.source: **多平台与富输出抽象。** ElBot 抽象了平台层与输出层，目前支持 CLI、QQ OneBot 和 QQ Official，并预留扩展其他平台的空间。

README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:a9d1c30ca58e93.source: ** ElBot 内置 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 元工具，允许 LLM 将可复用经验沉淀为 EL Skill。
README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:a9d1c30ca58e93.translation: ** ElBot has a built-in __ELBOT_CODE_0__ meta-tool, allowing LLMs to crystallize reusable experience into EL Skills.

README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:ae06f8efb42f69.source: 更长、更复杂的记忆由 LLM 按需通过 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 查询。
README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:ae06f8efb42f69.translation: Longer and more complex memories are queried by the LLM on demand via __ELBOT_CODE_0__.

README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:b00812fdabf375.source: Hook 可以修改消息、追加输出意图、调用低风险工具或注入常驻记忆。
README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:b00812fdabf375.translation: Hooks can modify messages, append output intents, call low-risk tools, or inject resident memory.

README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:b059c4077f5b42.source: 普通 Cron 按计划直接发送固定内容；
README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:b059c4077f5b42.translation: Standard Cron sends fixed content directly according to a schedule;

README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:b25cce63993bea.source: ** 研究表明，许多普通用户仍主要将 LLM 类产品用作更高级的搜索引擎、写作助手和倾听对象，频繁工具调用并不是所有对话的常态。
README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:b25cce63993bea.translation: ** Research shows that many ordinary users still primarily use LLM-based products as advanced search engines, writing assistants, and listening partners; frequent tool calls are not the norm for all conversations.

README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:b63d179f310361.source: ElBot 内置 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 元工具，允许 LLM 将可复用经验沉淀为 EL Skill。
README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:b63d179f310361.translation: ElBot features a built-in __ELBOT_CODE_0__ meta-tool, allowing LLMs to crystallize reusable experience into EL Skills.

README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:b99aceb5fee1d1.source: ElBot 内置持久化 Session 服务，支持会话恢复、归档、置顶、fork、删除、分页查看和平台隔离。
README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:b99aceb5fee1d1.translation: ElBot has a built-in persistent Session service, supporting Session recovery, archiving, pinning, forking, deletion, paginated viewing, and platform isolation.

README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:bba5fe1a79db2a.source: 极大程度减少无效上下文开销。

README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:bccc72c4ad7f5f.source: 文档维护策略：README 只保留项目入口和最小启动路径；
README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:bccc72c4ad7f5f.translation: Documentation maintenance strategy: The README only retains the project entry point and the minimum startup path;

README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:bd2d7a0747df86.source: 当前可通过隐藏包装工具执行附带 Python 脚本。
README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:bd2d7a0747df86.translation: Currently, bundled Python scripts can be executed via hidden wrapper tools.

README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:bd5b8229918b5e.source: **完善的日志与审计**： 区分运行日志、Elwisp 日志与审计日志，支持结构化字段、日志查询、审计查询和运行期调试。
README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:bd5b8229918b5e.translation: **Comprehensive Logging and Auditing**: Distinguishes between runtime logs, Elwisp logs, and audit logs, supporting structured fields, log queries, audit queries, and runtime debugging.

README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:bddeb4da9510d6.source: **Chat / Work 双模式**： ElBot 区分 chat 模式与 work 模式。
README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:bddeb4da9510d6.translation: **Chat / Work dual mode**: ElBot distinguishes between chat mode and work mode.

README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:bfa7ab109008d0.source: 创建后的纯 ELyph 文本或 Go 源码由统一的 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ / __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 维护。
README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:bfa7ab109008d0.translation: Pure ELyph text or Go source code created is maintained by a unified __ELBOT_CODE_0__ / __ELBOT_CODE_1__.

README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:c0b23da239318e.source: 内置规则 Hook、表情 Hook 和常驻记忆 Hook，支持后续扩展独立插件。
README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:c0b23da239318e.translation: Built-in rule Hooks, emoji Hooks, and resident memory Hooks are provided, with support for extending independent plugins in the future.

README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:c14d4e025e205c.source: 三者协作，让外部世界的任何信号如服务器告警、RSS 更新、Webhook、游戏事件、甚至外部计算机信息都能送入 Elnis，再交由 ElBot 处理并返回。
README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:c14d4e025e205c.translation: Working together, these three allow any signal from the external world—such as server alerts, RSS updates, Webhooks, game events, or even external computer information—to be sent to Elnis, then processed and returned by ElBot.

README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:c19a2747fd4b87.source: **兼容互联网 Python Skill**： 除了原生 EL Skill，ElBot 也兼容常见的 Python 外置 skill 结构。
README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:c19a2747fd4b87.translation: **Compatible with Internet Python Skills**: In addition to native EL Skills, ElBot is also compatible with common external Python skill structures.

README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:c1ad810b75707a.source: 开发期可以直接从源码启动：
README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:c1ad810b75707a.translation: During the development phase, you can start directly from the source code:

README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:c32a98b0b84290.source: 相比随意 Markdown，ELyph 更适合 LLM 之间复用和传递任务，也便于 lint、审计和后续工具化处理。
README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:c32a98b0b84290.translation: Compared to arbitrary Markdown, ELyph is better suited for reusing and passing tasks between LLMs, and is also easier for linting, auditing, and subsequent tooling.

README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:c41849141b7446.source: ** 后台 Shell 执行受到 AST 级沙盒约束。
README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:c41849141b7446.translation: ** Background Shell execution is constrained by AST-level sandboxing.

README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:c56b8a5a9b5bc5.source: 创建后的纯 ELyph 文本或 Go 源码由统一的 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ / __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 维护，源码改完后通过 __ELBOT_CODE_2__ 统一格式化、编译并返回检查结果。
README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:c56b8a5a9b5bc5.translation: The pure ELyph text or Go source code created is maintained by a unified __ELBOT_CODE_0__ / __ELBOT_CODE_1__; after the source code is modified, it is uniformly formatted and compiled via __ELBOT_CODE_2__, and the check results are returned.

README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:c6eb08a7f05ed5.source: Shell 补全可通过 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 生成，支持 __ELBOT_CODE_1__、__ELBOT_CODE_2__、__ELBOT_CODE_3__、__ELBOT_CODE_4__、__ELBOT_CODE_5__ 和 __ELBOT_CODE_6__。
README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:c6eb08a7f05ed5.translation: Shell completion can be generated via __ELBOT_CODE_0__, supporting __ELBOT_CODE_1__, __ELBOT_CODE_2__, __ELBOT_CODE_3__, __ELBOT_CODE_4__, __ELBOT_CODE_5__, and __ELBOT_CODE_6__.

README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:c7e57799914c88.source: ElBot 再统一决定是否记录、调用 LLM 分析或执行后台任务，最终通知用户。
README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:c7e57799914c88.translation: ElBot then centrally decides whether to record, call an LLM for analysis, or execute background tasks, and finally notify the user.

README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:ca22d135a17c51.source: ** ELyph 用于描述 LLM Cron 与原生 Skill。
README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:ca22d135a17c51.translation: ** ELyph is used to describe LLM Cron and native Skills.

README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:cc0bd55b55ce7f.source: ElBot 区分 chat 模式与 work 模式。
README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:cc0bd55b55ce7f.translation: ElBot distinguishes between chat mode and work mode.

README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:ccfd2b02c4033c.source: **CLI 客户端/服务端分离**： 支持任何电脑使用 ElBot 作为客户端连接 ElBot 服务端。
README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:ccfd2b02c4033c.translation: **CLI Client/Server Separation**: Supports using ElBot as a client on any computer to connect to the ElBot server.

README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:cd94f8a34fc78f.source: 支持普通聊天、工具调用、Hook 扩展、长期任务调度、持久化会话与上下文压缩，适合个人助理、平台机器人和可编排自动化助手等场景。
README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:cd94f8a34fc78f.translation: It supports general chat, tool calling, Hook extensions, long-term task scheduling, persistent Sessions, and context compaction, making it suitable for scenarios such as personal assistants, platform bots, and orchestratable automation assistants.

README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:ce8d66acc35a06.source: LLM Cron 用任务描述驱动模型执行，适合需要分析、归纳或使用工具的定时任务。
README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:ce8d66acc35a06.translation: LLM Cron drives model execution using task descriptions, making it suitable for scheduled tasks that require analysis, summarization, or the use of tools.

README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:deaf166c031ac9.source: 自动扫描 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 或 __ELBOT_CODE_1__，读取名称、描述、适用场景和风险等级；
README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:deaf166c031ac9.translation: Automatically scan __ELBOT_CODE_0__ or __ELBOT_CODE_1__ to read the name, description, applicable scenarios, and risk level;

README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:df29046950117f.source: **轻量沙盒隔离**： 后台 Shell 执行受到 AST 级沙盒约束。
README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:df29046950117f.translation: **Lightweight Sandbox Isolation**: Background Shell execution is subject to AST-level sandbox constraints.

README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:e6f4153f134915.source: 模型需要使用工具时，先按需发现工具详情，再由 Agent 注入对应 schema。
README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:e6f4153f134915.translation: When the model needs to use a tool, it first discovers the tool details on demand, and then the Agent injects the corresponding schema.

README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:e9d63a46f13f33.source: **极致轻量的 Go 实现。** ElBot 当前本地启动耗时 <10ms（N5105，sata固态），常驻内存约 30MB。
README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:e9d63a46f13f33.translation: **Ultra-lightweight Go implementation.** ElBot currently takes <10ms to start locally (N5105, SATA SSD), with resident memory of approximately 30MB.

README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:edc5a3a14ea83b.source: Elnis 是 ElBot 的监听枢纽；Elwisp 是分布在各处的监听器，负责观测世界。
README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:edc5a3a14ea83b.translation: Elnis is the listening hub of ElBot; Elwisp consists of listeners distributed everywhere, responsible for observing the world.

README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:efcf45b883dbce.source: ElBot 不会在每轮对话中默认注入所有工具的完整 schema，而是仅暴露 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 和当前可用工具名称。
README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:efcf45b883dbce.translation: ElBot does not inject the full schema of all tools by default in every round of conversation, but only exposes __ELBOT_CODE_0__ and the names of currently available tools.

README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:f2ead8a344911d.source: **极致节省 Token 的工具发现**： 研究表明，许多普通用户仍主要将 LLM 类产品用作更高级的搜索引擎、写作助手和倾听对象，频繁工具调用并不是所有对话的常态。
README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:f2ead8a344911d.translation: **Token-efficient tool discovery**: Research shows that many ordinary users still primarily use LLM-like products as advanced search engines, writing assistants, and listening objects; frequent tool calls are not the norm for all conversations.

README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:f46bac1c99a4ef.source: ElBot 抽象了平台层与输出层，目前支持 CLI 、QQ OneBot 和 QQ Official，并预留扩展其他平台的空间。
README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:f46bac1c99a4ef.translation: ElBot abstracts the platform and output layers, currently supporting CLI, QQ OneBot, and QQ Official, and reserves space for extending to other platforms.

README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:f66a9a3fb1f4be.source: 这种设计减少了绝大多数普通聊天中的无效上下文开销。
README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:f66a9a3fb1f4be.translation: This design reduces the invalid context overhead in the vast majority of ordinary chats.

README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:f8e466ac367698.source: **ELyph 任务表示法**： ELyph 用于描述 LLM Cron 与原生 Skill。
README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:f8e466ac367698.translation: **ELyph Task Notation**: ELyph is used to describe LLM Cron and native skills.

README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:fa3db717aba99b.source: **完善的日志与审计。** 区分运行日志、Elwisp 日志与审计日志，支持结构化字段、日志查询、审计查询和运行期调试。
README.zh-CN.md:paragraph:fa3db717aba99b.translation: **Comprehensive logging and auditing.** Distinguishes between runtime logs, Elwisp logs, and audit logs, supporting structured fields, log queries, audit queries, and runtime debugging.

docs/README.md:list:35f1b03774981b49a02e.translation: [Command Cheat Sheet](commands.md): View common slash commands and Session management methods.

docs/README.md:list:3e17b235a2be478b21e7.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 为中文源文件，__ELBOT_CODE_1__ 由 GitHub Actions 自动翻译，请勿手改；
docs/README.md:list:3e17b235a2be478b21e7.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ is the Chinese source file, and __ELBOT_CODE_1__ is automatically translated by GitHub Actions; do not edit it manually;

docs/README.md:list:4fa3148d2e12ea4a699a.source: 新增用户可见功能时，优先更新对应专题文档，而不是把细节全部塞进 README。
docs/README.md:list:4fa3148d2e12ea4a699a.translation: When adding user-visible features, prioritize updating the corresponding topic documentation instead of stuffing all details into the README.

docs/README.md:list:676cf7b537a528e8e0ec.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 放用户使用文档，避免混入开发任务流水账。
docs/README.md:list:676cf7b537a528e8e0ec.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ contains user documentation, avoiding the inclusion of development task logs.

docs/README.md:list:6e38716289e341fef634.source: 以版本（tag）为节点，平时改动写进 __ELBOT_CODE_0__，发版时将其改为 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 并新建空 Unreleased。
docs/README.md:list:6e38716289e341fef634.translation: Using versions (tags) as nodes, regular changes should be written into __ELBOT_CODE_0__; when releasing, change it to __ELBOT_CODE_1__ and create a new empty Unreleased.

docs/README.md:list:b458ca24b5d56f6ca819.translation: [Core Concepts](concepts.md): Understand Chat / Work modes, tool discovery, Session, Hook, Cron, Skill, and security policies.

docs/README.md:list:bde7e37979d0e00dfe4a.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ only retains the project introduction, quick entry points, and the minimum startup path.

docs/README.md:list:c5b48b30108c9b1ff727.translation: [Elnis Configuration and Usage](elnis-usage.md): Enable Elnis, configure Elwisp, and deliver events using Elvena.

docs/README.md:list:deca1c32aca61b193dde.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ contains development plans, task breakdowns, architecture drafts, and interface drafts.

docs/README.md:list:ebd53d55610920fa20e0.translation: [Elnis Listening Hub](elnis.md): Learn about Elnis, Elwisp, Elvena, and external event access.

docs/README.md:list:eefedc6adaeda98a1b7a.translation: [Quick Start](getting-started.md): From configuring the API Key to launching the CLI, complete your first conversation.

docs/README.md:paragraph:1dd32f9d7b7a529.source: 这里是面向用户的 ElBot 文档。开发计划、任务拆分和内部设计资料已移到 [__ELBOT_CODE_0__](../devdocs/)。
docs/README.md:paragraph:1dd32f9d7b7a529.translation: This is the user-facing ElBot documentation. Development plans, task breakdowns, and internal design materials have been moved to [__ELBOT_CODE_0__](../devdocs/).

docs/README.md:paragraph:d3463fc8b32e931.source: ElBot 仍在开发中，配置、命令和扩展接口可能调整。文档优先覆盖当前稳定且常用的使用路径；实验性能力会尽量标注。
docs/README.md:paragraph:d3463fc8b32e931.translation: ElBot is still under development; configurations, commands, and extension interfaces may be adjusted. Documentation prioritizes coverage of current stable and commonly used paths; experimental capabilities will be labeled as such where possible.

docs/commands.md:list:184cff66666bbc1247.source: 已有历史的 work Session 不能直接切到 chat；需要先 __ELBOT_CODE_0__，再 __ELBOT_CODE_1__。
docs/commands.md:list:184cff66666bbc1247.translation: A work Session with existing history cannot be switched directly to chat; you need to __ELBOT_CODE_0__ first, and then __ELBOT_CODE_1__.

docs/commands.md:list:56f592b51f3e4db3f0.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 展示的编号可被 __ELBOT_CODE_1__、__ELBOT_CODE_2__、__ELBOT_CODE_3__、__ELBOT_CODE_4__ 等命令复用。
docs/commands.md:list:56f592b51f3e4db3f0.translation: The IDs displayed by __ELBOT_CODE_0__ can be reused by commands such as __ELBOT_CODE_1__, __ELBOT_CODE_2__, __ELBOT_CODE_3__, and __ELBOT_CODE_4__.

docs/commands.md:list:618c24a7386c369400.source: CLI 作为本地高权限入口，可以跨平台查看 Session；非 CLI 平台默认只查看当前平台和作用域下的 Session。
docs/commands.md:list:618c24a7386c369400.translation: CLI serves as a local high-privilege entry point and can view Sessions across platforms; non-CLI platforms view Sessions under the current platform and scope by default.

docs/commands.md:list:a0b5430c1b57bff3b1.source: 自动压缩由 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 和 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 控制。
docs/commands.md:list:a0b5430c1b57bff3b1.translation: Automatic compaction is controlled by __ELBOT_CODE_0__ and __ELBOT_CODE_1__.

docs/commands.md:list:a9cf3d8b3aa0479861.source: 删除是永久操作，需要显式 __ELBOT_CODE_0__。
docs/commands.md:list:a9cf3d8b3aa0479861.translation: Deletion is a permanent operation and requires explicit __ELBOT_CODE_0__.

docs/commands.md:list:b697cfc2231f030876.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 模式不注入工具，适合闲聊、陪伴和低成本问答。
docs/commands.md:list:b697cfc2231f030876.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ mode does not inject tools, making it suitable for casual chat, companionship, and low-cost Q&A.

docs/commands.md:list:cb73e0f2b874464a2f.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 模式启用工具发现和工具调用。
docs/commands.md:list:cb73e0f2b874464a2f.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ mode enables tool discovery and tool calling.

docs/commands.md:list:e850fda8108ea39dcd.source: 压缩只影响发送给 LLM 的上下文视图，不删除原始消息历史。
docs/commands.md:list:e850fda8108ea39dcd.translation: Compaction only affects the context view sent to the LLM and does not delete the original message history.

docs/commands.md:paragraph:0659d53aec527.source: LLM 在 work 模式下可以通过 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 按需发现工具详情。聊天中也可以用 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 预载工具。
docs/commands.md:paragraph:0659d53aec527.translation: In work mode, the LLM can discover tool details on demand via __ELBOT_CODE_0__. In chat, __ELBOT_CODE_1__ can also be used to preload tools.

docs/commands.md:paragraph:1632ad5994e50.source: LLM 在 work 模式下可以通过 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 按需发现工具详情。
docs/commands.md:paragraph:1632ad5994e50.translation: In work mode, the LLM can discover tool details on demand via __ELBOT_CODE_0__.

docs/commands.md:paragraph:1b0f8169cc843.source: 具体提示以运行时输出为准。
docs/commands.md:paragraph:1b0f8169cc843.translation: Specific prompts are subject to the runtime output.

docs/commands.md:paragraph:5b9cabfff6946.source: 聊天中也可以用 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 预载工具，或用 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 把 Skill 文档加入本轮消息并预载对应运行 wrapper。
docs/commands.md:paragraph:5b9cabfff6946.translation: In chat, you can also use __ELBOT_CODE_0__ to preload tools, or use __ELBOT_CODE_1__ to add Skill documentation to the current round of messages and preload the corresponding runtime wrapper.

docs/commands.md:paragraph:7b5dd9c95b68c.source: 模型参数可以是列表编号、模型名或 __ELBOT_CODE_0__。
docs/commands.md:paragraph:7b5dd9c95b68c.translation: Model parameters can be a list number, model name, or __ELBOT_CODE_0__.

docs/concepts.md:paragraph:3152044b75de7.source: 后台 Cron 有独立 Session 和 sandbox 约束。LLM Cron 可以预注入工具名称，让模型在后台任务中稳定使用指定工具。
docs/concepts.md:paragraph:3152044b75de7.translation: Background Cron has independent Session and sandbox constraints. LLM Cron can pre-inject tool names, allowing the model to stably use specified tools in background tasks.

docs/concepts.md:paragraph:381a3f69f52ea.source: 平台适配层只负责把平台消息转换为统一输入，以及把输出意图发送回平台。Agent Core 不依赖具体平台。
docs/concepts.md:paragraph:381a3f69f52ea.translation: The platform adapter layer is only responsible for converting platform messages into a unified input and sending the output intent back to the platform. Agent Core does not depend on a specific platform.

docs/concepts.md:paragraph:38a64066706bd.source: Hook 可以修改消息、追加输出意图、调用低风险工具或注入常驻记忆。
docs/concepts.md:paragraph:38a64066706bd.translation: Hooks can modify messages, append output intents, call low-risk tools, or inject resident memory.

docs/concepts.md:paragraph:39b3682e25632.source: 工具结果可以回灌给 LLM，也可以返回平台无关的输出意图，由 Agent 统一发送。
docs/concepts.md:paragraph:39b3682e25632.translation: Tool results can be fed back to the LLM, or return platform-independent output intents, which are sent uniformly by the Agent.

docs/concepts.md:paragraph:3e1fc867acd73.translation: The platform adapter layer is responsible for:

docs/concepts.md:paragraph:41dc92661a4b0.source: 后台 Cron 有独立 Session 和 sandbox 约束。
docs/concepts.md:paragraph:41dc92661a4b0.translation: Background Cron has an independent Session and sandbox constraints.

docs/concepts.md:paragraph:427e01fa6bb52.source: Platform Adapter 负责接入具体平台。当前主要包括：
docs/concepts.md:paragraph:427e01fa6bb52.translation: Platform Adapter is responsible for integrating specific platforms. Currently, it mainly includes:

docs/concepts.md:paragraph:468d8eedd8cf5.source: 用户可以在普通输入中用 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 提前指定工具或工具 tag。
docs/concepts.md:paragraph:468d8eedd8cf5.translation: Users can use __ELBOT_CODE_0__ in ordinary input to specify tools or tool tags in advance.

docs/concepts.md:paragraph:4712d1994170f.source: ElBot 从 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 加载 Agent 的基础 System Prompt。
docs/concepts.md:paragraph:4712d1994170f.translation: ElBot loads the Agent's basic System Prompt from __ELBOT_CODE_0__.

docs/concepts.md:paragraph:50c5082d241f2.source: 压缩后的上下文视图通常由“最新摘要 + 摘要之后的新消息”组成。
docs/concepts.md:paragraph:50c5082d241f2.translation: The compacted context view typically consists of "the latest summary + new messages after the summary".

docs/concepts.md:paragraph:5920982e3b2aa.source: ElBot 不会在每轮 work 对话中默认注入所有工具的完整 schema。
docs/concepts.md:paragraph:5920982e3b2aa.translation: ElBot does not inject the full schema of all tools by default in every round of work conversation.

docs/concepts.md:paragraph:5a88c641964bc.source: LLM Cron 可以通过 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 预注入工具名或 Skill 名：普通工具会注入 schema，Skill 会把说明注入后台任务 prompt，并自动注入对应 runner。
docs/concepts.md:paragraph:5a88c641964bc.translation: LLM Cron can pre-inject tool names or Skill names via __ELBOT_CODE_0__: ordinary tools will inject the schema, while Skills will inject the description into the background task prompt and automatically inject the corresponding runner.

docs/concepts.md:paragraph:5c1934d62e934.source: 完整语法见 [ELyph 任务表示法](elyph.md)。
docs/concepts.md:paragraph:5c1934d62e934.translation: For the complete syntax, see [ELyph Task Notation](elyph.md).

docs/concepts.md:paragraph:5d9e5b4fed321.source: Hook Layer 用于在关键流程前后扩展行为，例如：
docs/concepts.md:paragraph:5d9e5b4fed321.translation: The Hook Layer is used to extend behavior before and after critical processes, for example:

docs/concepts.md:paragraph:61d630cd91ce0.source: LLM Cron 的最终 JSON 可通过 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 附带当前任务工作目录内的图片或文件相对路径。
docs/concepts.md:paragraph:61d630cd91ce0.translation: The final JSON of LLM Cron can attach relative paths of images or files within the current task working directory via __ELBOT_CODE_0__.

docs/concepts.md:paragraph:65fc08efe1525.source: CLI 默认本地用户 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 是超级管理员。
docs/concepts.md:paragraph:65fc08efe1525.translation: The default local CLI user __ELBOT_CODE_0__ is a superadmin.

docs/concepts.md:paragraph:6614c3bc4ac4b.source: ElBot 的工具系统包含风险等级和权限控制。
docs/concepts.md:paragraph:6614c3bc4ac4b.translation: ElBot's tool system includes risk levels and permission control.

docs/concepts.md:paragraph:66434b0faf95d.source: LLM Cron 的最终 JSON 可通过 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 附带当前任务工作目录内的图片或文件相对路径。
docs/concepts.md:paragraph:66434b0faf95d.translation: The final JSON of LLM Cron can attach relative paths of images or files within the current task working directory via __ELBOT_CODE_0__.

docs/concepts.md:paragraph:6e42cc2f1a5cd.source: 本文档解释 ElBot 的主要概念，帮助理解为什么它这样组织对话、工具、上下文和扩展能力。
docs/concepts.md:paragraph:6e42cc2f1a5cd.translation: This document explains the main concepts of ElBot to help you understand how it organizes conversations, tools, context, and extensibility.

docs/concepts.md:paragraph:716a2d101d4ad.source: Session 是 ElBot 的持久化会话单位。它保存：
docs/concepts.md:paragraph:716a2d101d4ad.translation: A Session is the persistent session unit of ElBot. It saves:

docs/concepts.md:paragraph:7875bae6f1658.source: Output Layer 定义平台无关的输出意图，例如：
docs/concepts.md:paragraph:7875bae6f1658.translation: The Output Layer defines platform-agnostic output intents, for example:

docs/concepts.md:paragraph:7cc0ee085179b.source: 常驻记忆内部保存为 core 和 normal 两段：core 用于核心信息，修改需要高风险确认；
docs/concepts.md:paragraph:7cc0ee085179b.translation: Resident memory is internally saved as two segments, core and normal: core is used for core information, and modifications require high-risk confirmation;

docs/concepts.md:paragraph:7ffa11ff072aa.source: 长期记忆使用 Markdown 文件作为人类可读源数据，SQLite FTS 作为可重建搜索索引。
docs/concepts.md:paragraph:7ffa11ff072aa.translation: Long-term memory uses Markdown files as human-readable source data and SQLite FTS as a reconstructible search index.

docs/concepts.md:paragraph:864086a84543b.source: 后台任务中的所有路径参数都应使用当前任务工作目录内的相对路径；
docs/concepts.md:paragraph:864086a84543b.translation: All path parameters in background tasks should use relative paths within the current task working directory;

docs/concepts.md:paragraph:89b0e88796be2.source: 有效指令会被剥离并持久化到当前 Session 的工具缓存；无效值会保留为普通文本并提示。
docs/concepts.md:paragraph:89b0e88796be2.translation: Valid commands will be stripped and persisted to the tool cache of the current Session; invalid values will be kept as ordinary text and a prompt will be shown.

docs/concepts.md:paragraph:8dfd7329621fb.source: 用户可以在普通输入中提前指定本轮要用的工具或 Skill。
docs/concepts.md:paragraph:8dfd7329621fb.translation: Users can specify the tools or Skills to be used in the current round in advance within a normal input.

docs/concepts.md:paragraph:91c51d1136ba7.source: Agent、Hook 和 Tool 不应该直接依赖具体平台发送消息，而是返回 output intent，由 Output Manager 统一发送。
docs/concepts.md:paragraph:91c51d1136ba7.translation: Agents, Hooks, and tools should not directly depend on specific platforms to send messages; instead, they should return an output intent, which is then sent uniformly by the Output Manager.

docs/concepts.md:paragraph:965b3b7728322.source: ElBot 支持 Skill 扩展，并引入 ELyph Task Notation 描述可复用任务。
docs/concepts.md:paragraph:965b3b7728322.translation: ElBot supports Skill extensions and introduces ELyph Task Notation to describe reusable tasks.

docs/concepts.md:paragraph:9d0fd6757d20b.source: Tool Runtime 管理工具的注册、发现、权限、风险评估和执行。
docs/concepts.md:paragraph:9d0fd6757d20b.translation: Tool Runtime manages the registration, discovery, permissions, risk assessment, and execution of tools.

docs/concepts.md:paragraph:9d72fee0bac8d.source: Elnis 不作为聊天平台，也不替代 Cron。
docs/concepts.md:paragraph:9d72fee0bac8d.translation: Elnis does not serve as a chat platform, nor does it replace Cron.

docs/concepts.md:paragraph:9e49f557aef34.source: ElBot 把对话分成两种模式：
docs/concepts.md:paragraph:9e49f557aef34.translation: ElBot divides conversations into two modes:

docs/concepts.md:paragraph:a800da9d165f4.source: 工具发现、常驻记忆和时间等动态信息不会硬编码进 __ELBOT_CODE_0__。
docs/concepts.md:paragraph:a800da9d165f4.translation: Dynamic information such as tool discovery, resident memory, and time will not be hard-coded into __ELBOT_CODE_0__.

docs/concepts.md:paragraph:ad7f6c7b3785a.translation: ElBot divides memory into two categories:

docs/concepts.md:paragraph:b190195feaad5.source: ElBot 支持 Skill 扩展，并引入 ELyph Task Notation（任务表示法）描述可复用任务。
docs/concepts.md:paragraph:b190195feaad5.translation: ElBot supports Skill extensions and introduces ELyph Task Notation to describe reusable tasks.

docs/concepts.md:paragraph:bba7fced0f9c1.source: ElBot 包含两层 Cron 能力：
docs/concepts.md:paragraph:bba7fced0f9c1.translation: ElBot includes two layers of Cron capabilities:

docs/concepts.md:paragraph:bc1ef24d4bdb1.source: Elvena 是 Elwisp 向 Elnis 投递事件的协议。
docs/concepts.md:paragraph:bc1ef24d4bdb1.translation: Elvena is the event protocol used by Elwisp to deliver events to Elnis.

docs/concepts.md:paragraph:bde0c0ecdce57.source: 可以用 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 和 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 在运行时查询。
docs/concepts.md:paragraph:bde0c0ecdce57.translation: You can use __ELBOT_CODE_0__ and __ELBOT_CODE_1__ to query at runtime.

docs/concepts.md:paragraph:bde9adb0e488c.source: Elnis 是 ElBot 的监听枢纽，用于接收外部事件。
docs/concepts.md:paragraph:bde9adb0e488c.translation: Elnis is ElBot's listening hub, used for receiving external events.

docs/concepts.md:paragraph:be68688280420.source: 普通用户引用时只会作为普通引用文本处理。
docs/concepts.md:paragraph:be68688280420.translation: When a regular user quotes it, it will only be processed as ordinary quoted text.

docs/concepts.md:paragraph:c10f293d07ac3.source: 无效值会保留为普通文本并提示。
docs/concepts.md:paragraph:c10f293d07ac3.translation: Invalid values will be kept as plain text and a prompt will be shown.

docs/concepts.md:paragraph:c6097edaa165e.source: Agent Core 是 ElBot 的对话与编排中心，负责：
docs/concepts.md:paragraph:c6097edaa165e.translation: Agent Core is the conversation and orchestration center of ElBot, responsible for:

docs/concepts.md:paragraph:d01dd6b9b007c.source: 这种机制可以减少普通任务中的无效上下文开销，也能降低无关工具干扰。
docs/concepts.md:paragraph:d01dd6b9b007c.translation: This mechanism can reduce invalid context overhead in ordinary tasks and also lower interference from irrelevant tools.

docs/concepts.md:paragraph:d02992bacc59f.source: Fork 用于从历史 assistant 消息处创建新的对话分支。
docs/concepts.md:paragraph:d02992bacc59f.translation: Fork is used to create a new conversation branch from a historical assistant message.

docs/concepts.md:paragraph:e6fa4b3e4e856.source: 注入 Prompt 时不会暴露分段标题，而是合并成一段自然文本。
docs/concepts.md:paragraph:e6fa4b3e4e856.translation: When injecting the Prompt, segment headings will not be exposed; instead, they will be merged into a single piece of natural text.

docs/concepts.md:paragraph:e8d962a2e596e.source: Cron 处理“按时间触发”的任务，Elnis 处理“按外部事件触发”的任务。
docs/concepts.md:paragraph:e8d962a2e596e.translation: Cron handles "time-triggered" tasks, while Elnis handles "external event-triggered" tasks.

docs/concepts.md:paragraph:eb28bc34b1889.source: 多个 ELyph Skill 同时注入时，ELyph 规则说明只会加入一次。
docs/concepts.md:paragraph:eb28bc34b1889.translation: When multiple ELyph Skills are injected simultaneously, the ELyph rule description will only be added once.

docs/concepts.md:paragraph:eea78ccedc04a.source: normal 用于普通信息，可追加、覆盖或清空。
docs/concepts.md:paragraph:eea78ccedc04a.translation: normal is used for general information and can be appended, overwritten, or cleared.

docs/concepts.md:paragraph:ef0042c9b2a07.source: Elwisp 是外部子监听器，负责观察服务器、Webhook、RSS、日志或脚本输出等外部世界。
docs/concepts.md:paragraph:ef0042c9b2a07.translation: Elwisp is an external sub-listener responsible for observing the external world, such as servers, Webhooks, RSS, logs, or script outputs.

docs/concepts.md:paragraph:f63c44a9c3da8.source: 它们的分工是：Elwisp 观测一切，Elnis 管理一切，ElBot 掌控最终执行与投递。
docs/concepts.md:paragraph:f63c44a9c3da8.translation: Their division of labor is: Elwisp observes everything, Elnis manages everything, and ElBot controls the final execution and delivery.

docs/concepts.md:paragraph:f82019b0f0bd4.source: ELyph 的目标是用更短、更稳定的结构表达输入、输出、步骤、条件和约束，减少自然语言任务描述的歧义。
docs/concepts.md:paragraph:f82019b0f0bd4.translation: The goal of ELyph is to express inputs, outputs, steps, conditions, and constraints using shorter and more stable structures, reducing ambiguity in natural language task descriptions.

docs/concepts.md:paragraph:f96953e887775.source: 重要约定：Hook 不替代 Security Layer，安全判定仍以 Security Layer 为准。
docs/concepts.md:paragraph:f96953e887775.translation: Important convention: Hooks do not replace the Security Layer; security determinations are still based on the Security Layer.

docs/concepts.md:paragraph:f9be8056fedfb.translation: ElBot is still under rapid development:

docs/concepts.md:table:1a7b37e0c1ec3282e.source: 更长、更复杂的信息，以 Markdown 为源数据，通过工具按需搜索。
docs/concepts.md:table:1a7b37e0c1ec3282e.translation: Longer and more complex information, using Markdown as source data, searched on-demand via tools.

docs/concepts.md:table:213b0c51dfa7359b8.source: 启用工具发现与工具调用
docs/concepts.md:table:213b0c51dfa7359b8.translation: Enable tool discovery and tool calling

docs/concepts.md:table:274b2621cfd1a630b.source: 闲聊、陪伴、轻量问答、低成本对话
docs/concepts.md:table:274b2621cfd1a630b.translation: Casual chat, companionship, lightweight Q&A, low-cost conversation

docs/concepts.md:table:3c50ba9b877eae1e9.source: 追踪权限拒绝、工具调用、危险确认、Cron 投递等关键行为。
docs/concepts.md:table:3c50ba9b877eae1e9.translation: Track critical behaviors such as permission denials, tool calls, danger confirmations, and Cron deliveries.

docs/concepts.md:table:9c8dc67c599b9ff2b.source: 按任务描述驱动模型执行，并可使用工具。
docs/concepts.md:table:9c8dc67c599b9ff2b.translation: Drive model execution based on task descriptions, with the ability to use tools.

docs/concepts.md:table:c04e106231d02a750.source: 按计划直接发送固定内容。
docs/concepts.md:table:c04e106231d02a750.translation: Send fixed content directly according to a schedule.

docs/concepts.md:table:c8c84522d8966c8af.source: 搜索、文件、命令、Cron、Skill 等任务
docs/concepts.md:table:c8c84522d8966c8af.translation: Tasks such as search, files, command, Cron, Skill, etc.

docs/concepts.md:table:d40a886fe08aa8bed.source: 排查启动、模型请求、平台连接、持久化等运行问题。
docs/concepts.md:table:d40a886fe08aa8bed.translation: Troubleshoot runtime issues such as startup, model requests, platform connections, and persistence.

docs/concepts.md:table:ea165e7c0ea5f518c.source: 短小、稳定、每轮都可能有用的信息，会被注入 Prompt。
docs/concepts.md:table:ea165e7c0ea5f518c.translation: Short, stable information that may be useful in every round will be injected into the Prompt.

docs/configuration.md:code-comment:toml:.source: 手动补充模型列表（API 获取不到时使用）
docs/configuration.md:code-comment:toml:.translation: Manually supplemented model list (used when the API cannot retrieve them)

docs/configuration.md:code-comment:toml:.source: 可选：为特定模型配置 context_window 或 extra_payload
docs/configuration.md:code-comment:toml:.translation: Optional: configure context_window or extra_payload for specific models

docs/configuration.md:code-comment:toml:.source: 可选；先读系统环境变量，再读配置目录 .env
docs/configuration.md:code-comment:toml:.translation: Optional; reads system environment variables first, then the .env file in the configuration directory

docs/configuration.md:list:005872fed21e1.source: 压缩只影响发给 LLM 的上下文视图，不删除原始历史。
docs/configuration.md:list:005872fed21e1.translation: Compression only affects the context view sent to the LLM and does not delete the original history.

docs/configuration.md:list:0115dab787da9.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__：定义一个可在聊天里使用的 tag，例如 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 对应 __ELBOT_CODE_2__。
docs/configuration.md:list:0115dab787da9.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__: Defines a tag that can be used in chat, for example, __ELBOT_CODE_1__ corresponds to __ELBOT_CODE_2__.

docs/configuration.md:list:02bc072cdf9df.source: Elvena 请求中的 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 进入校验、持久化和执行链路；外部工具名仍需由单个 Elwisp 的禁用列表控制。
docs/configuration.md:list:02bc072cdf9df.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ in Elvena requests enters the validation, persistence, and execution chain; external tool names are still controlled by the denylist of individual Elwisps.

docs/configuration.md:list:069c4c956592e.source: 也可以用 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 直接写入配置。
docs/configuration.md:list:069c4c956592e.translation: You can also use __ELBOT_CODE_0__ to write the configuration directly.

docs/configuration.md:list:0afcd43ab1b95.source: 群聊/超级群组中，命令前缀、触发关键词、__ELBOT_CODE_0__ 或回复 bot 消息都会触发处理。私聊默认处理。
docs/configuration.md:list:0afcd43ab1b95.translation: In group chats/supergroups, command prefixes, trigger keywords, __ELBOT_CODE_0__, or replying to bot messages will all trigger processing. Private chats are processed by default.

docs/configuration.md:list:121deebefceae.source: 超级管理员调用高风险工具时也需要确认。
docs/configuration.md:list:121deebefceae.translation: Superadmins also need confirmation when calling high-risk tools.

docs/configuration.md:list:154128536f0d4.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 可不配置；留空表示当前不启用任何 Elwisp。
docs/configuration.md:list:154128536f0d4.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ is optional; leaving it empty indicates that no Elwisp is currently enabled.

docs/configuration.md:list:18256ba1fd771.source: Elvena 请求中的 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 声明仍是开发中能力，不建议作为稳定接口依赖。
docs/configuration.md:list:18256ba1fd771.translation: The __ELBOT_CODE_0__ declaration in Elvena requests is still a feature under development and is not recommended as a stable interface dependency.

docs/configuration.md:list:1a6e36e8d42f8.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 是默认值：使用普通 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ + __ELBOT_CODE_2__，并把常见 Markdown 轻量转换成 Telegram HTML；
docs/configuration.md:list:1a6e36e8d42f8.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ is the default value: uses standard __ELBOT_CODE_1__ + __ELBOT_CODE_2__, and performs a lightweight conversion of common Markdown to Telegram HTML;

docs/configuration.md:list:1d33334f232d6.source: 未指定或对应槽位未配置时回退到 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 模型。
docs/configuration.md:list:1d33334f232d6.translation: If not specified or if the corresponding slot is not configured, it will fall back to the __ELBOT_CODE_0__ model.

docs/configuration.md:list:1e4e61ce9aa1d.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 是 Elnis 内部工具白名单；未单独配置的 Elwisp 继承全局默认。
docs/configuration.md:list:1e4e61ce9aa1d.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ is the Elnis internal tool whitelist; Elwisps without separate configurations inherit the global default.

docs/configuration.md:list:29a04e1e2026e.source: 若平台配置不存在，则自动在平台配置目录生成默认配置文件。
docs/configuration.md:list:29a04e1e2026e.translation: If the platform configuration does not exist, a default configuration file will be automatically generated in the platform configuration directory.

docs/configuration.md:list:2e202f83cb7bc.source: 改变默认路径或启动行为时同步更新 [快速开始](getting-started.md) 和 README。
docs/configuration.md:list:2e202f83cb7bc.translation: Update [Quick Start](getting-started.md) and README synchronously when changing default paths or startup behavior.

docs/configuration.md:list:2f1302efd1298.source: 超级管理员配置按平台分组填写平台原生用户 ID，例如 __ELBOT_CODE_0__；
docs/configuration.md:list:2f1302efd1298.translation: The superadmin configuration should be filled in by platform group using the platform's native user ID, for example __ELBOT_CODE_0__;

docs/configuration.md:list:30840ca097b9c.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 关闭格式化，只发送纯文本。
docs/configuration.md:list:30840ca097b9c.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ disables formatting and sends only plain text.

docs/configuration.md:list:3300e1f18cd98.source: token 从系统环境变量或配置目录 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 读取，日志只记录 token name，不记录 token 原文。
docs/configuration.md:list:3300e1f18cd98.translation: The token is read from system environment variables or the configuration directory __ELBOT_CODE_0__. Logs only record the token name, not the raw token.

docs/configuration.md:list:33bfeb03b05e6.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 为特定模型配置 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 和 __ELBOT_CODE_2__，两者都是可选的。
docs/configuration.md:list:33bfeb03b05e6.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ configures __ELBOT_CODE_1__ and __ELBOT_CODE_2__ for specific models; both are optional.

docs/configuration.md:list:37929a359e1a2.source: 单个 Elwisp 若配置 __ELBOT_CODE_0__，会覆盖全局默认。
docs/configuration.md:list:37929a359e1a2.translation: If a single Elwisp configures __ELBOT_CODE_0__, it will override the global default.

docs/configuration.md:list:380a6a0590e12.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 是实验模式：使用 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ / 私聊 __ELBOT_CODE_2__，Rich Message 失败时会自动退回 HTML；
docs/configuration.md:list:380a6a0590e12.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ is an experimental mode: uses __ELBOT_CODE_1__ / private chat __ELBOT_CODE_2__, and automatically falls back to HTML if Rich Message fails;

docs/configuration.md:list:3a9949395a8ea.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 的 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 是全局回退值，没有在 __ELBOT_CODE_2__ 里配 __ELBOT_CODE_3__ 时使用。
docs/configuration.md:list:3a9949395a8ea.translation: The __ELBOT_CODE_1__ of __ELBOT_CODE_0__ is a global fallback value, used when __ELBOT_CODE_3__ is not configured in __ELBOT_CODE_2__.

docs/configuration.md:list:3bde83cd85506.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 用来配置 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 可注入的工具组，以及 tag 激活后追加到 system prompt 的工具使用策略。
docs/configuration.md:list:3bde83cd85506.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ is used to configure the tool groups that can be injected into __ELBOT_CODE_1__, as well as the tool usage strategies appended to the system prompt after a tag is activated.

docs/configuration.md:list:40ca22a0cc1b1.source: 激活的 tag 会写入 Session metadata，__ELBOT_CODE_0__ 后仍生效。
docs/configuration.md:list:40ca22a0cc1b1.translation: Activated tags are written to the Session metadata and remain effective after __ELBOT_CODE_0__.

docs/configuration.md:list:4bcbc0d124768.source: 配置 tag 会追加到内置 tag，不覆盖内置 tag。
docs/configuration.md:list:4bcbc0d124768.translation: Configured tags will be appended to built-in tags, not overwrite them.

docs/configuration.md:list:52166eb639a55.source: 启动连接成功后，ElBot 会把内置 slash 命令同步到 Telegram bot 命令菜单；只同步主命令名，不同步 alias。
docs/configuration.md:list:52166eb639a55.translation: After the connection is successfully established, ElBot will synchronize built-in slash commands to the Telegram bot command menu; only main command names are synchronized, not aliases.

docs/configuration.md:list:53ad113082397.source: Elwisp 默认启用；只有显式配置 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 才会禁用对应 Elwisp。
docs/configuration.md:list:53ad113082397.translation: Elwisp is enabled by default; the corresponding Elwisp will only be disabled if __ELBOT_CODE_0__ is explicitly configured.

docs/configuration.md:list:545838f4da5c1.translation: Elnis delivery is allowed by default;

docs/configuration.md:list:57546c6a4ffe3.source: 首期支持 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 和 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 模式；__ELBOT_CODE_2__ 模式预留给后续 background runner。
docs/configuration.md:list:57546c6a4ffe3.translation: The initial phase supports __ELBOT_CODE_0__ and __ELBOT_CODE_1__ modes; the __ELBOT_CODE_2__ mode is reserved for the subsequent background runner.

docs/configuration.md:list:5835750295f3c.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 使用 Provider 的 OpenAI-compatible API 地址。
docs/configuration.md:list:5835750295f3c.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ uses the Provider's OpenAI-compatible API address.

docs/configuration.md:list:58543b52b0496.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__, if __ELBOT_CODE_1__ is configured in the service environment.

docs/configuration.md:list:59d573568621c.source: 也可以通过 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 手动压缩当前 Session。
docs/configuration.md:list:59d573568621c.translation: You can also manually compress the current Session via __ELBOT_CODE_0__.

docs/configuration.md:list:5cf1b61b51a85.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 模式可在 Elvena 请求中指定 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 为 __ELBOT_CODE_2__、__ELBOT_CODE_3__ 或 __ELBOT_CODE_4__；
docs/configuration.md:list:5cf1b61b51a85.translation: In __ELBOT_CODE_0__ mode, __ELBOT_CODE_1__ can be specified as __ELBOT_CODE_2__, __ELBOT_CODE_3__, or __ELBOT_CODE_4__ in Elvena requests;

docs/configuration.md:list:64a8a1c8b969b.source: prompt 文本从 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 动态读取；文件变更后影响后续请求，行为类似 __ELBOT_CODE_1__。
docs/configuration.md:list:64a8a1c8b969b.translation: Prompt text is dynamically read from __ELBOT_CODE_0__; changes to the file affect subsequent requests, behaving similarly to __ELBOT_CODE_1__.

docs/configuration.md:list:64d5a689eabeb.source: CLI token 与 Provider API Key 一样，优先读系统环境变量，再读配置目录 __ELBOT_CODE_0__。
docs/configuration.md:list:64d5a689eabeb.translation: Similar to the Provider API Key, the CLI token prioritizes system environment variables, then reads the configuration directory __ELBOT_CODE_0__.

docs/configuration.md:list:64f41c4e27010.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__：这个 tag 成功激活后追加到 system prompt 的工具使用策略。内容会直接给模型看，不会自动添加 tag 名标题。
docs/configuration.md:list:64f41c4e27010.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__: The tool usage strategy appended to the system prompt after this tag is successfully activated. The content will be presented directly to the model without automatically adding a tag name header.

docs/configuration.md:list:6554fbd6b74ff.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 使用指定客户端 profile；未指定时使用 __ELBOT_CODE_1__。
docs/configuration.md:list:6554fbd6b74ff.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ uses the specified client profile; if not specified, __ELBOT_CODE_1__ is used.

docs/configuration.md:list:658171a951c59.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 时，__ELBOT_CODE_1__ 会启动 CLI WebSocket 服务端。
docs/configuration.md:list:658171a951c59.translation: When __ELBOT_CODE_0__, __ELBOT_CODE_1__ will start the CLI WebSocket server.

docs/configuration.md:list:673c5146aa00d.source: 重复预载已经存在的工具时不会重复添加，平台会提示 __ELBOT_CODE_0__。
docs/configuration.md:list:673c5146aa00d.translation: When preloading tools that already exist, they will not be added again, and the platform will prompt __ELBOT_CODE_0__.

docs/configuration.md:list:68f0985d08a4d.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 模式不注入工具，适合闲聊和低成本对话。
docs/configuration.md:list:68f0985d08a4d.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ mode does not inject tools, making it suitable for casual chatting and low-cost conversations.

docs/configuration.md:list:6a1d42f9c0819.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 是手动补充的模型名列表，当 Provider 的模型列表接口获取不到某些模型时使用。
docs/configuration.md:list:6a1d42f9c0819.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ is a manually supplemented list of model names, used when the Provider's model list interface cannot retrieve certain models.

docs/configuration.md:list:6ccdb54bf6f5a.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 是全局回退值，模型块里没配 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 时使用。
docs/configuration.md:list:6ccdb54bf6f5a.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ is a global fallback value, used when __ELBOT_CODE_1__ is not configured in the model block.

docs/configuration.md:list:6cd89da7557c0.source: 外部工具默认允许；只有单个 Elwisp 配置 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 时才禁用指定外部工具。
docs/configuration.md:list:6cd89da7557c0.translation: External tools are allowed by default; specified external tools are only disabled when a single Elwisp configures __ELBOT_CODE_0__.

docs/configuration.md:list:6f70babf7b66d.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 会合并到 LLM 请求 JSON 中，模型级覆盖 Provider 级。
docs/configuration.md:list:6f70babf7b66d.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ will be merged into the LLM request JSON, with model-level settings overriding provider-level settings.

docs/configuration.md:list:7cc26368a77ad.source: 建议把 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 写成具体工具使用策略，不要写“当前 tag 是 xxx”这类模型不需要知道的配置机制。
docs/configuration.md:list:7cc26368a77ad.translation: It is recommended to write __ELBOT_CODE_0__ as a specific tool usage strategy, rather than configuration mechanisms that the model does not need to know, such as "the current tag is xxx".

docs/configuration.md:list:7f34133b5869a.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 和单 Elwisp __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 用于显式禁止平台、私聊或群聊，配置中的 platform-only 表示禁用整个平台所有投递。
docs/configuration.md:list:7f34133b5869a.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ and single Elwisp __ELBOT_CODE_1__ are used to explicitly prohibit platforms, private chats, or group chats; `platform-only` in the configuration indicates that all deliveries for the entire platform are disabled.

docs/configuration.md:list:826c019d3d469.source: 用户可编辑配置集中放在平台配置目录，避免直接改源码示例。
docs/configuration.md:list:826c019d3d469.translation: User-editable configurations should be centralized in the platform configuration directory to avoid directly modifying source code examples.

docs/configuration.md:list:8282f9bd1ed78.source: 运行时使用 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 切换模型后，状态会写回 __ELBOT_CODE_1__。
docs/configuration.md:list:8282f9bd1ed78.translation: After switching models using __ELBOT_CODE_0__ at runtime, the state will be written back to __ELBOT_CODE_1__.

docs/configuration.md:list:82e581473bd3a.source: 高风险工具确认消息会附带 Telegram inline keyboard，点击按钮会转换为 __ELBOT_CODE_0__、__ELBOT_CODE_1__ 等现有确认命令。
docs/configuration.md:list:82e581473bd3a.translation: Confirmation messages for high-risk tools will be accompanied by a Telegram inline keyboard; clicking buttons will convert them into existing confirmation commands such as __ELBOT_CODE_0__ and __ELBOT_CODE_1__.

docs/configuration.md:list:8566f4e0df9f6.source: Elvena 请求可通过 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 指定，未配置时回退到 __ELBOT_CODE_1__。
docs/configuration.md:list:8566f4e0df9f6.translation: Elvena requests can be specified via __ELBOT_CODE_0__, falling back to __ELBOT_CODE_1__ when not configured.

docs/configuration.md:list:86ccc30cbfdb0.source: Elvena 请求中的 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 声明是开发中能力，但已进入校验、持久化和执行链路；外部工具名仍需由单个 Elwisp 的禁用列表控制。
docs/configuration.md:list:86ccc30cbfdb0.translation: The __ELBOT_CODE_0__ declaration in Elvena requests is a capability under development, but it has already entered the validation, persistence, and execution pipelines; external tool names still need to be controlled by the denylist of an individual Elwisp.

docs/configuration.md:list:889f8c6736729.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__：这个 tag 会预载的工具名列表。工具名必须是已注册且当前用户有权限访问的工具。
docs/configuration.md:list:889f8c6736729.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__: A list of tool names that this tag will preload. Tool names must be registered tools that the current user has permission to access.

docs/configuration.md:list:90a1769dc5a38.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 模式只支持按 Elnis 裁决后的平台发送给 superadmins，不支持任意 user/group 目标。
docs/configuration.md:list:90a1769dc5a38.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ mode only supports sending to superadmins via the platform after Elnis adjudication; it does not support arbitrary user/group targets.

docs/configuration.md:list:90e6137fb9fd8.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 可手动补充模型列表；也可以通过 Provider 的模型列表接口获取。
docs/configuration.md:list:90e6137fb9fd8.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ can be used to manually supplement the model list, or it can be obtained via the Provider's model list interface.

docs/configuration.md:list:923100a5b4347.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__、__ELBOT_CODE_1__、__ELBOT_CODE_2__ 是 Elnis LLM 事件可选模型槽位；
docs/configuration.md:list:923100a5b4347.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__, __ELBOT_CODE_1__, and __ELBOT_CODE_2__ are optional model slots for Elnis LLM events;

docs/configuration.md:list:9356104be7e21.source: 普通用户只能发现和调用允许风险范围内的工具。
docs/configuration.md:list:9356104be7e21.translation: Regular users can only discover and call tools within the allowed risk range.

docs/configuration.md:list:94006ee9a3f8d.source: 若平台配置和源码示例配置都不存在，则自动在平台配置目录生成默认配置文件。
docs/configuration.md:list:94006ee9a3f8d.translation: If neither the platform configuration nor the source code example configuration exists, a default configuration file will be automatically generated in the platform configuration directory.

docs/configuration.md:list:94b781836317d.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 是服务端允许登录的 CLI client id 与 token 环境变量列表。
docs/configuration.md:list:94b781836317d.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ is the list of CLI client ID and token environment variables allowed to log in to the server.

docs/configuration.md:list:95285e9503bcc.source: CLI 默认本地用户 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 是超级管理员。
docs/configuration.md:list:95285e9503bcc.translation: The default local CLI user __ELBOT_CODE_0__ is a superadmin.

docs/configuration.md:list:99014d75e5826.source: 真实密钥放系统环境变量或 __ELBOT_CODE_0__。
docs/configuration.md:list:99014d75e5826.translation: Place actual keys in system environment variables or __ELBOT_CODE_0__.

docs/configuration.md:list:9af77c14a8c47.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 指向环境变量名，推荐用这种方式保存密钥。
docs/configuration.md:list:9af77c14a8c47.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ points to an environment variable name; this method is recommended for saving keys.

docs/configuration.md:list:9e1c16784381b.source: 直接 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 只预载指定工具，不激活 tag prompt。
docs/configuration.md:list:9e1c16784381b.translation: Directly using __ELBOT_CODE_0__ only preloads the specified tools and does not activate the tag prompt.

docs/configuration.md:list:a8cc1dc35863d.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 是客户端默认连接地址；连接其他机器时在 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 写远程 WebSocket 地址。
docs/configuration.md:list:a8cc1dc35863d.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ is the default client connection address; when connecting to other machines, enter the remote WebSocket address in __ELBOT_CODE_1__.

docs/configuration.md:list:b71f94dcfb7ea.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 决定新 Session 默认进入 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 还是 __ELBOT_CODE_2__。
docs/configuration.md:list:b71f94dcfb7ea.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ determines whether a new Session defaults to __ELBOT_CODE_1__ or __ELBOT_CODE_2__.

docs/configuration.md:list:bfa0df2dd496c.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 支持写成列表，按顺序尝试多个环境变量名；适合临时切换 token 或做多环境兼容。
docs/configuration.md:list:bfa0df2dd496c.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ can be written as a list to try multiple environment variable names in order; this is suitable for temporarily switching tokens or achieving multi-environment compatibility.

docs/configuration.md:list:c40d77868f838.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 填 Telegram 用户 ID 或可直接发送的私聊 chat ID，用于超级管理员权限与通知投递。
docs/configuration.md:list:c40d77868f838.translation: Fill __ELBOT_CODE_0__ with a Telegram user ID or a private chat ID that can be sent to directly, used for superadmin permissions and notification delivery.

docs/configuration.md:list:c62e1f3b1a43d.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 控制流式刷新节流间隔，默认 250ms，避免触发平台限频。
docs/configuration.md:list:c62e1f3b1a43d.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ controls the streaming refresh throttle interval, defaulting to 250ms, to avoid triggering platform rate limits.

docs/configuration.md:list:c95ef3dd8d5be.source: 开启后，Session 上下文接近窗口上限时会触发压缩。
docs/configuration.md:list:c95ef3dd8d5be.translation: When enabled, compaction will be triggered when the Session context approaches the window limit.

docs/configuration.md:list:cb73e0f2b8744.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 模式启用工具发现和工具调用。
docs/configuration.md:list:cb73e0f2b8744.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ mode enables tool discovery and tool calling.

docs/configuration.md:list:cc75aaac10c3a.source: 当前支持 __ELBOT_CODE_0__、__ELBOT_CODE_1__ 和 __ELBOT_CODE_2__ 模式；__ELBOT_CODE_3__ 模式使用后台 Session runner 执行。
docs/configuration.md:list:cc75aaac10c3a.translation: Currently, __ELBOT_CODE_0__, __ELBOT_CODE_1__, and __ELBOT_CODE_2__ modes are supported; __ELBOT_CODE_3__ mode is executed using a background Session runner.

docs/configuration.md:list:d2b7fd98cacdd.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 可选，支持 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 和 __ELBOT_CODE_2__ 代理地址。
docs/configuration.md:list:d2b7fd98cacdd.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ is optional and supports __ELBOT_CODE_1__ and __ELBOT_CODE_2__ proxy addresses.

docs/configuration.md:list:d3e9e843be133.source: 平台配置目录：Windows __ELBOT_CODE_0__；Linux 使用 XDG 配置目录。
docs/configuration.md:list:d3e9e843be133.translation: Platform configuration directory: Windows __ELBOT_CODE_0__; Linux uses the XDG configuration directory.

docs/configuration.md:list:d7c3bc1bddbe6.source: 部分客户端可能无法查看 Rich Message。
docs/configuration.md:list:d7c3bc1bddbe6.translation: Some clients may not be able to view Rich Messages.

docs/configuration.md:list:d7d77ed548b2b.source: 只有 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 成功命中至少一个工具后，当前 Session 才会激活该 tag 的 prompt。
docs/configuration.md:list:d7d77ed548b2b.translation: Only after __ELBOT_CODE_0__ successfully hits at least one tool will the current Session activate the prompt for that tag.

docs/configuration.md:list:d8c1371115318.source: 新增配置项时同步更新本文档。
docs/configuration.md:list:d8c1371115318.translation: Update this document synchronously when adding new configuration items.

docs/configuration.md:list:e00e58dc6a9ee.source: 支持标题、引用、分割线、代码块和表格的可读渲染，失败时自动纯文本重试。
docs/configuration.md:list:e00e58dc6a9ee.translation: Supports readable rendering of headings, quotes, horizontal rules, code blocks, and tables, with automatic plain text retry upon failure.

docs/configuration.md:list:e1c0fc9140814.source: 也可以用 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 直接写入配置，但不建议提交真实 token。
docs/configuration.md:list:e1c0fc9140814.translation: You can also use __ELBOT_CODE_0__ to write the configuration directly, but it is not recommended to commit actual tokens.

docs/configuration.md:list:ebeb56a48082d.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 指向 Bot Token 的变量名，读取顺序为系统环境变量、配置目录 __ELBOT_CODE_1__；
docs/configuration.md:list:ebeb56a48082d.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ is the variable name pointing to the Bot Token; the reading order is system environment variables, then the configuration directory __ELBOT_CODE_1__;

docs/configuration.md:list:ed50dc150a423.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 和 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 报告只支持按 Elnis 裁决后的平台发送给 superadmins，不支持任意 user/group 目标。
docs/configuration.md:list:ed50dc150a423.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ and __ELBOT_CODE_1__ reports only support sending to superadmins via the platform decided by Elnis, and do not support arbitrary user/group targets.

docs/configuration.md:list:f31646a8be06d.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 指向系统环境变量中的 Bot Token；也可以用 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 直接写入配置，但不建议提交真实 token。
docs/configuration.md:list:f31646a8be06d.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ points to the Bot Token in the system environment variables; you can also use __ELBOT_CODE_1__ to write it directly into the configuration, but it is not recommended to commit real tokens.

docs/configuration.md:list:ff0bb46d8c010.source: 运行期 actor ID 会统一显示为 __ELBOT_CODE_0__。
docs/configuration.md:list:ff0bb46d8c010.translation: The runtime actor ID will be uniformly displayed as __ELBOT_CODE_0__.

docs/configuration.md:list:ff5524722281e.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 指向代理地址的变量名，读取顺序同样为系统环境变量、配置目录 __ELBOT_CODE_1__；
docs/configuration.md:list:ff5524722281e.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ is the variable name pointing to the proxy address; the reading order is likewise system environment variables, then the configuration directory __ELBOT_CODE_1__;

docs/configuration.md:paragraph:001e68ad.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 同时保存 CLI 服务端和客户端配置。
docs/configuration.md:paragraph:001e68ad.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ stores both CLI server and client configurations.

docs/configuration.md:paragraph:00f55798.translation: Existing files will not be overwritten.

docs/configuration.md:paragraph:09ee1cae.source: 启用后，ElBot 会启动本地 HTTP ingress，接收 Elwisp 按 Elvena 协议投递的事件。
docs/configuration.md:paragraph:09ee1cae.translation: Once enabled, ElBot will start a local HTTP ingress to receive events delivered by Elwisp according to the Elvena protocol.

docs/configuration.md:paragraph:0c5d3130.source: 如需使用临时配置文件，也可以显式指定 __ELBOT_CODE_0__。
docs/configuration.md:paragraph:0c5d3130.translation: If you need to use a temporary configuration file, you can also explicitly specify __ELBOT_CODE_0__.

docs/configuration.md:paragraph:0d9a547d.source: 这些路径都会解析到 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 目录下。
docs/configuration.md:paragraph:0d9a547d.translation: These paths will all resolve to the __ELBOT_CODE_0__ directory.

docs/configuration.md:paragraph:123944ca.source: 相对路径以 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 所在目录为基准：
docs/configuration.md:paragraph:123944ca.translation: Relative paths are based on the directory where __ELBOT_CODE_0__ is located:

docs/configuration.md:paragraph:168a6216.source: 首次自动生成的文件包括：__ELBOT_CODE_0__、__ELBOT_CODE_1__、__ELBOT_CODE_2__、__ELBOT_CODE_3__、__ELBOT_CODE_4__、__ELBOT_CODE_5__ 和 __ELBOT_CODE_6__；
docs/configuration.md:paragraph:168a6216.translation: Files automatically generated for the first time include: __ELBOT_CODE_0__, __ELBOT_CODE_1__, __ELBOT_CODE_2__, __ELBOT_CODE_3__, __ELBOT_CODE_4__, __ELBOT_CODE_5__, and __ELBOT_CODE_6__;

docs/configuration.md:paragraph:1faa263b.source: 运行日志、SQLite、sandbox 等运行数据也会按配置或默认数据目录存放。
docs/configuration.md:paragraph:1faa263b.translation: Runtime logs, SQLite, sandbox, and other runtime data will also be stored according to the configuration or the default data directory.

docs/configuration.md:paragraph:1feaca43.source: 默认使用 __ELBOT_CODE_0__。如果要支持其他命令前缀，可以在这里添加。
docs/configuration.md:paragraph:1feaca43.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ is used by default. If you want to support other command prefixes, you can add them here.

docs/configuration.md:paragraph:26d74004.source: ElBot 使用一个主配置入口加载应用配置、Provider 配置和运行态状态。开发期不考虑旧配置兼容，建议直接按当前 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 示例维护。
docs/configuration.md:paragraph:26d74004.translation: ElBot uses a main configuration entry to load application configurations, Provider configurations, and runtime states. Backward compatibility for old configurations is not considered during the development phase; it is recommended to maintain them directly according to the current __ELBOT_CODE_0__ example.

docs/configuration.md:paragraph:2b27f119.source: 这会把 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 下配置的工具预载到当前 Session。如果 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 非空，也会从本轮开始追加到 system prompt。
docs/configuration.md:paragraph:2b27f119.translation: This will preload the tools configured under __ELBOT_CODE_0__ into the current Session. If __ELBOT_CODE_1__ is not empty, it will also be appended to the system prompt starting from this round.

docs/configuration.md:paragraph:2bf74e95.source: Elnis 配置建议拆到独立 __ELBOT_CODE_0__，__ELBOT_CODE_1__ 只保留入口路径。
docs/configuration.md:paragraph:2bf74e95.translation: It is recommended to split the Elnis configuration into a separate __ELBOT_CODE_0__, while __ELBOT_CODE_1__ only retains the entry path.

docs/configuration.md:paragraph:409f4189.translation: Automatic generation is only triggered when there are no explicit __ELBOT_CODE_0__ and __ELBOT_CODE_1__.

docs/configuration.md:paragraph:42c35c35.source: 长度单位 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 可以近似理解为“中文按字数、英文按单词”：中日韩字符按单字计数，英文/数字连续片段按一个词计数。
docs/configuration.md:paragraph:42c35c35.translation: The length unit __ELBOT_CODE_0__ can be roughly understood as "Chinese by character count, English by word count": CJK characters are counted individually, and continuous segments of English/numbers are counted as one word.

docs/configuration.md:paragraph:5aeb7fbf.translation: For more information, see [Elnis Configuration and Usage](elnis-usage.md).

docs/configuration.md:paragraph:6b461f3d.translation: Elnis is disabled by default. Once enabled, ElBot will start a local HTTP ingress to receive events delivered by Elwisp according to the Elvena protocol.

docs/configuration.md:paragraph:6dcbe64f.translation: Default maintenance tasks include the cleanup of logs, artifacts, and chat history; for example, chat history cleanup is executed daily at 04:35 by default:

docs/configuration.md:paragraph:6f5fa3c3.translation: Relative paths are resolved based on the directory of the main configuration file by default.

docs/configuration.md:paragraph:6ffb3c57.translation: At the same time, the directories __ELBOT_CODE_0__, __ELBOT_CODE_1__, __ELBOT_CODE_2__, __ELBOT_CODE_3__, and __ELBOT_CODE_4__ will be created.

docs/configuration.md:paragraph:736ad932.translation: Configurations for the official QQ bot and QQ OneBot are commented out by default in the examples. When enabling them, you need to provide the platform's own authentication information, connection address, or trigger keywords.

docs/configuration.md:paragraph:853cfdea.source: QQ 官方机器人、QQ OneBot 和 Telegram 配置在示例中默认注释。启用时需要补齐平台自己的认证信息、连接地址或触发关键词。
docs/configuration.md:paragraph:853cfdea.translation: QQ Official Bot, QQ OneBot, and Telegram configurations are commented out by default in the examples. When enabling them, you need to complete the platform's own authentication information, connection address, or trigger keywords.

docs/configuration.md:paragraph:8af22db2.translation: When left blank, the platform's default data directory is used:

docs/configuration.md:paragraph:8b93dd73.translation: Resident memory data is saved by default in __ELBOT_CODE_0__ of the configuration directory, and the file is generated when the program runs for the first time. The length limits for the two resident memory segments, core and normal, can be set in the main configuration:

docs/configuration.md:paragraph:92e9ae62.source: ElBot 使用一个主配置入口加载应用配置、Provider 配置和运行态状态。默认配置由程序内置 assets 生成到平台配置目录；已有配置文件不会被覆盖。
docs/configuration.md:paragraph:92e9ae62.translation: ElBot uses a main configuration entry to load application configuration, Provider configuration, and runtime state. Default configurations are generated from the program's built-in assets into the platform configuration directory; existing configuration files will not be overwritten.

docs/configuration.md:paragraph:98eb7743.source: 默认维护任务包含日志、Session、sandbox 和聊天历史清理，例如 Session 清理默认保留 30 天，sandbox 默认每天 04:00 清理 7 天前内容，聊天历史默认每天 04:35 执行：
docs/configuration.md:paragraph:98eb7743.translation: Default maintenance tasks include the cleanup of logs, Sessions, sandboxes, and chat history. For example, Session cleanup defaults to a 30-day retention period, sandbox content older than 7 days is cleaned up daily at 04:00 by default, and chat history cleanup is executed daily at 04:35 by default:

docs/configuration.md:paragraph:9ebb7813.source: 如果使用 asdf、mise、Nix、Linuxbrew、Snap 或自定义安装路径，推荐直接把实际 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 路径写入 __ELBOT_CODE_1__，不要依赖交互 shell 的初始化脚本。
docs/configuration.md:paragraph:9ebb7813.translation: If using asdf, mise, Nix, Linuxbrew, Snap, or a custom installation path, it is recommended to write the actual __ELBOT_CODE_0__ path directly into __ELBOT_CODE_1__, rather than relying on the initialization scripts of an interactive shell.

docs/configuration.md:paragraph:a09a6a29.source: Cron 表达式由内部 Cron Runtime 调度，使用 Linux crontab 风格的 5 字段格式：__ELBOT_CODE_0__。
docs/configuration.md:paragraph:a09a6a29.translation: Cron expressions are scheduled by the internal Cron Runtime, using the Linux crontab-style 5-field format: __ELBOT_CODE_0__.

docs/configuration.md:paragraph:a273c4a8.source: 这些路径都会解析到主配置文件所在目录下；默认情况下就是平台配置目录。
docs/configuration.md:paragraph:a273c4a8.translation: These paths will all be resolved to the directory where the main configuration file is located; by default, this is the platform configuration directory.

docs/configuration.md:paragraph:a728fb7f.source: 若显式指定的配置路径不存在，ElBot 会报错而不是偷偷生成，避免掩盖路径拼写错误。
docs/configuration.md:paragraph:a728fb7f.translation: If the explicitly specified configuration path does not exist, ElBot will report an error instead of silently generating it, to avoid masking path spelling errors.

docs/configuration.md:paragraph:af2ed8d7.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ defaults to __ELBOT_CODE_1__, and HTTP listening will not be started on the first run.

docs/configuration.md:paragraph:b5677d6b.translation: Files automatically generated for the first time include: __ELBOT_CODE_0__, __ELBOT_CODE_1__, __ELBOT_CODE_2__, __ELBOT_CODE_3__, __ELBOT_CODE_4__, and __ELBOT_CODE_5__;

docs/configuration.md:paragraph:b8c38345.translation: When injecting the Prompt, the two segments will be merged into a single piece of natural text.

docs/configuration.md:paragraph:c0bca0b3.source: 若 ElBot 以 Linux service 运行，service 环境可能没有加载交互 shell 的 __ELBOT_CODE_0__，导致终端里可用的 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 在 ElBot 中不可见。
docs/configuration.md:paragraph:c0bca0b3.translation: If ElBot is running as a Linux service, the service environment may not have loaded the __ELBOT_CODE_0__ of the interactive shell, causing the __ELBOT_CODE_1__ available in the terminal to be invisible to ElBot.

docs/configuration.md:paragraph:c409a2ad.source: 运行日志、SQLite、sandbox、artifact 等运行数据也会按配置或默认数据目录存放。
docs/configuration.md:paragraph:c409a2ad.translation: Runtime logs, SQLite, sandbox, artifacts, and other runtime data will also be stored according to the configuration or the default data directory.

docs/configuration.md:paragraph:c6184922.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 是当前 ElBot 作为服务端运行时读取的配置，__ELBOT_CODE_1__ 是当前命令作为 CLI 客户端连接服务端时读取的配置。
docs/configuration.md:paragraph:c6184922.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ is the configuration read when the current ElBot runs as a server, and __ELBOT_CODE_1__ is the configuration read when the current command connects to the server as a CLI client.
