docs/configuration.md:paragraph:d43f0962.source: 所有配置文件均由程序内置 assets 首次运行时自动生成到平台配置目录，已有文件不会被覆盖；源码中不再保留 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 目录。
docs/configuration.md:paragraph:d43f0962.translation: All configuration files are automatically generated from the program's built-in assets to the platform configuration directory upon the first run; existing files will not be overwritten, and the __ELBOT_CODE_0__ directory is no longer retained in the source code.

docs/configuration.md:paragraph:e22cf630.source: 修改 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 或 systemd 环境后，需要重启 ElBot service。
docs/configuration.md:paragraph:e22cf630.translation: After modifying __ELBOT_CODE_0__ or the systemd environment, the ElBot service needs to be restarted.

docs/configuration.md:paragraph:e24623b4.source: 不要把真实 Key 提交到仓库。
docs/configuration.md:paragraph:e24623b4.translation: Do not commit actual keys to the repository.

docs/configuration.md:paragraph:e43dcfde.source: Cron 表达式由内部 Cron Runtime 调度。默认维护任务包含日志、artifact 和聊天历史清理。
docs/configuration.md:paragraph:e43dcfde.translation: Cron expressions are scheduled by the internal Cron Runtime. Default maintenance tasks include the cleanup of logs, artifacts, and chat history.

docs/configuration.md:paragraph:eebb4356.source: 自动生成的默认配置内容来自程序内置 assets，且已有文件不会被覆盖。
docs/configuration.md:paragraph:eebb4356.translation: The content of the automatically generated default configuration comes from the program's built-in assets, and existing files will not be overwritten.

docs/configuration.md:paragraph:f273c79b.source: 源码中的 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 目录只保留可独立维护的示例/辅助配置文件；主配置 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 首次运行时由程序内置 assets 生成到平台配置目录。
docs/configuration.md:paragraph:f273c79b.translation: The __ELBOT_CODE_0__ directory in the source code only retains example/auxiliary configuration files that can be maintained independently; the main configuration __ELBOT_CODE_1__ is generated from the program's built-in assets into the platform configuration directory upon the first run.

docs/configuration.md:paragraph:f33bc6ca.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 是独立配置文件，路径由 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 指定。
docs/configuration.md:paragraph:f33bc6ca.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ is a standalone configuration file, with its path specified by __ELBOT_CODE_1__.

docs/configuration.md:paragraph:f4c36dd0.source: 修改 Go skill 的 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 后，ElBot 会自动执行 __ELBOT_CODE_1__、__ELBOT_CODE_2__ 并 reload。
docs/configuration.md:paragraph:f4c36dd0.translation: After modifying the __ELBOT_CODE_0__ of the Go Skill, ElBot will automatically execute __ELBOT_CODE_1__, __ELBOT_CODE_2__, and reload.

docs/configuration.md:paragraph:f59d5b9c.source: Hook 和插件不要直接发平台消息，应返回输出意图，由 Agent 统一交给 Output Manager 发送。
docs/configuration.md:paragraph:f59d5b9c.translation: Hooks and plugins should not send platform messages directly; they should return an output intent, which the Agent then passes to the Output Manager for sending.

docs/elnis-usage.md:code-comment:toml:a2.translation: Background queue length for LLM mode.

docs/elnis-usage.md:code-comment:toml:b0.source: { platform = "telegram" }, # 禁用 telegram 整个平台所有投递。
docs/elnis-usage.md:code-comment:toml:b0.translation: { platform = "telegram" }, # Disable all deliveries for the entire telegram platform.

docs/elnis-usage.md:code-comment:toml:bc.source: 是否允许投递给目标平台超级管理员。
docs/elnis-usage.md:code-comment:toml:bc.translation: Whether delivery to the target platform's superadmin is allowed.

docs/elnis-usage.md:code-comment:toml:c2.source: 从系统环境变量或配置目录 .env 读取。
docs/elnis-usage.md:code-comment:toml:c2.translation: Read from system environment variables or the .env file in the configuration directory.

docs/elnis-usage.md:code-comment:toml:e2.translation: Overrides the top-level allowed_tools when present.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:003001043952716.source: Elwisp 不能绕过 Tool Runtime 和 Security Policy 调用 ElBot 内部工具；
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:003001043952716.translation: Elwisp cannot bypass Tool Runtime and Security Policy to call ElBot internal tools;

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:1cd550c5433eab9.translation: The original token text is not written to logs.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:2e54ae6e5d79891.source: 当前 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 只适用于 Elnis 与 CLI 同处一个 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 前台进程的场景；
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:2e54ae6e5d79891.translation: Currently, __ELBOT_CODE_0__ is only applicable to scenarios where Elnis and the CLI are in the same __ELBOT_CODE_1__ foreground process;

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:386db06d0684ed7.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 表示允许投递给目标平台超级管理员。
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:386db06d0684ed7.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ indicates that delivery to the target platform's superadmin is allowed.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:39d59267ebaab21.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__: deliver to a specified platform group chat.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:3b53bcdbdd90365.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 使用指定客户端 profile 连接服务端；只有一个默认客户端时可省略 __ELBOT_CODE_1__。
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:3b53bcdbdd90365.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ uses a specified client profile to connect to the server; __ELBOT_CODE_1__ can be omitted when there is only one default client.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:43e4e906b591aba.source: Elwisp 不能绕过 Tool Runtime 和 Security Policy 调用 ElBot 工具。
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:43e4e906b591aba.translation: Elwisp cannot bypass the Tool Runtime and Security Policy to call ElBot tools.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:4d0d28105262232.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 限制哪些 token 可以代表该 Elwisp 投递事件；不写则允许任意已认证 token。
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:4d0d28105262232.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ restricts which tokens can represent the Elwisp to deliver events; if not specified, any authenticated token is allowed.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:4fdcb65d6e8a1c2.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 暂不能把消息投递到另一个独立 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 进程。
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:4fdcb65d6e8a1c2.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ cannot currently deliver messages to another independent __ELBOT_CODE_1__ process.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:5c6d736596b8e68.source: 外部工具调用由 Elnis 对声明的 endpoint 发起 HTTP JSON POST；外部工具自身负责实际风险边界，Elnis 侧按 low 风险处理。
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:5c6d736596b8e68.translation: External tool calls are initiated by Elnis as HTTP JSON POST requests to the declared endpoint; the external tool itself is responsible for the actual risk boundary, and Elnis handles it as low-risk.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:62a744b0b6e7b92.translation: Local protocols such as __ELBOT_CODE_0__ are prohibited.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:660911e77f107b6.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 只能选择 __ELBOT_CODE_1__、__ELBOT_CODE_2__、__ELBOT_CODE_3__，不能指定任意内部模式名。
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:660911e77f107b6.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ can only choose __ELBOT_CODE_1__, __ELBOT_CODE_2__, or __ELBOT_CODE_3__, and cannot specify an arbitrary internal mode name.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:72f74d2a2cdd5ca.source: Elwisp 默认启用；没写 __ELBOT_CODE_0__、写了但没写 __ELBOT_CODE_1__、或写了 __ELBOT_CODE_2__ 都会接收。
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:72f74d2a2cdd5ca.translation: Elwisp is enabled by default; it will receive events if __ELBOT_CODE_0__ is not specified, if it is specified but __ELBOT_CODE_1__ is not, or if __ELBOT_CODE_2__ is specified.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:73d5fe9665af132.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 是 Elnis 策略允许的默认投递平台。
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:73d5fe9665af132.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ is the default delivery platform allowed by the Elnis policy.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:758b64310e1f465.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 时，__ELBOT_CODE_1__ 会启动本地 CLI WebSocket 服务端。
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:758b64310e1f465.translation: When __ELBOT_CODE_0__, __ELBOT_CODE_1__ will start a local CLI WebSocket server.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:807392aba7b653e.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__：投递到所有已启用平台超级管理员，不能同时写 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 或 __ELBOT_CODE_2__。
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:807392aba7b653e.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__: deliver to the superadmins of all enabled platforms; __ELBOT_CODE_1__ or __ELBOT_CODE_2__ cannot be written at the same time.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:8ae9e28aae0d922.source: 单个 Elwisp 可用 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 禁用指定工具。
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:8ae9e28aae0d922.translation: A single Elwisp can use __ELBOT_CODE_0__ to disable specific tools.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:8eb172baff6cb1b.source: Elwisp 声明的外部 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 默认允许，并通过 ToolRun 以 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 形式注入为模型可调用函数名；
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:8eb172baff6cb1b.translation: External __ELBOT_CODE_0__ declared by Elwisp are allowed by default and are injected as model-callable function names in the form of __ELBOT_CODE_1__ via ToolRun;

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:93d6cff528647d8.source: Elwisp 声明的 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 当前仍是开发中能力，不应作为稳定接口依赖。
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:93d6cff528647d8.translation: The __ELBOT_CODE_0__ declared by Elwisp is currently still under development and should not be relied upon as a stable interface.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:941b47c124f2856.source: direct 模式同样支持 image/file 输出，平台不支持时自动降级为文字描述。
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:941b47c124f2856.translation: Direct mode also supports image/file output; it automatically degrades to a text description if the platform does not support it.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:94b781836317d24.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 是服务端允许登录的 CLI client id 与 token 环境变量列表。
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:94b781836317d24.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ is the list of CLI client ID and token environment variables allowed for server login.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:99267342faabbf9.source: 需要接收 Elvena 事件时请使用 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 或 __ELBOT_CODE_1__。
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:99267342faabbf9.translation: Please use __ELBOT_CODE_0__ or __ELBOT_CODE_1__ when you need to receive Elvena events.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:9e77000334927a8.source: 只有显式 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 才会禁用对应 Elwisp。
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:9e77000334927a8.translation: Only explicit __ELBOT_CODE_0__ will disable the corresponding Elwisp.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:a02dcfcfc7aeb5a.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__: deliver to a specified platform private chat.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:a8cc1dc35863df7.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 是客户端默认连接地址；连接其他机器时在 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 写远程 WebSocket 地址。
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:a8cc1dc35863df7.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ is the default connection address for the client; when connecting to other machines, specify the remote WebSocket address in __ELBOT_CODE_1__.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:af47283fd76be05.source: 当前 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 只适用于 Elnis 与 CLI 同处一个 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 前台进程，或 service 模式启用 CLI 远程服务端的场景；
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:af47283fd76be05.translation: Currently, __ELBOT_CODE_0__ only applies to scenarios where Elnis and the CLI are in the same __ELBOT_CODE_1__ foreground process, or when the CLI remote server is enabled in service mode;

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:b402ea8c3ed8917.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 时不启动 Elnis HTTP runtime。
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:b402ea8c3ed8917.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ will not start the Elnis HTTP runtime.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:bc6075397e81dca.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 可以写多个环境变量名，按顺序尝试。
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:bc6075397e81dca.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ can contain multiple environment variable names, which will be tried in order.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:c29df2c57475853.source: 顶层 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 是 ElBot 内部工具默认白名单，单个 Elwisp 的 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 存在时覆盖它。
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:c29df2c57475853.translation: The top-level __ELBOT_CODE_0__ is the default whitelist for ElBot internal tools; it is overridden when __ELBOT_CODE_1__ of an individual Elwisp exists.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:c4ed0195b6b6e83.source: Elnis 接收后自动下载到 __ELBOT_CODE_0__。
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:c4ed0195b6b6e83.translation: Elnis automatically downloads it to __ELBOT_CODE_0__ upon receipt.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:ca55d61a6160292.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 中的工具名或 Skill 名都会经过 Elnis __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 裁决。
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:ca55d61a6160292.translation: Tool names or Skill names in __ELBOT_CODE_0__ will all undergo Elnis __ELBOT_CODE_1__ adjudication.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:ce044b9ed5ef1d0.source: 独立 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 进程需连接服务端后才能收到通知。
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:ce044b9ed5ef1d0.translation: Independent __ELBOT_CODE_0__ processes must connect to the server before they can receive notifications.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:d627a0566699b39.source: Elwisp 不能直接发送平台消息。
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:d627a0566699b39.translation: Elwisp cannot send platform messages directly.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:d705c8398c10672.source: 只有 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 或单 Elwisp __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 显式列出的目标会被禁止。
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:d705c8398c10672.translation: Only targets explicitly listed in __ELBOT_CODE_0__ or a single Elwisp __ELBOT_CODE_1__ will be prohibited.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:ec3ddb6e6198fb8.source: token 名只用于日志和审计，不等同于 Elwisp 身份。
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:ec3ddb6e6198fb8.translation: The token name is used only for logs and audit logs, and is not equivalent to the Elwisp identity.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:ed2ead06ed2b4af.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ URI 仅支持 base64 编码，解码后同样受限。
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:ed2ead06ed2b4af.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ URIs only support base64 encoding and are similarly restricted after decoding.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:ef07a3cc0f03355.source: 发送到 LLM 时使用原始 URL（多模态模型可直接看图），沙盒保留副本。
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:ef07a3cc0f03355.translation: The original URL is used when sending to the LLM (multimodal models can view images directly), and a copy is kept in the sandbox.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:f05de9594a7ea18.source: 只写 __ELBOT_CODE_0__：投递到该平台超级管理员。
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:f05de9594a7ea18.translation: Only write __ELBOT_CODE_0__: deliver to the superadmin of that platform.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:f37c91ec3dffafe.source: token 原文不写入配置，推荐放在系统环境变量或配置目录 __ELBOT_CODE_0__。
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:f37c91ec3dffafe.translation: Do not write the token plaintext into the configuration; it is recommended to place it in system environment variables or the configuration directory __ELBOT_CODE_0__.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:f5a5eaccc2efc4c.source: 外部工具默认允许；单个 Elwisp 可以用 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 禁用指定外部工具。
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:f5a5eaccc2efc4c.translation: External tools are allowed by default; an individual Elwisp can use __ELBOT_CODE_0__ to disable specific external tools.

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:fc0f75611e8b81f.source: 文件大小受 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 的 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 限制（默认 100MB）。
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:fc0f75611e8b81f.translation: File size is limited by __ELBOT_CODE_1__ of __ELBOT_CODE_0__ (default 100MB).

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:fc9a2a279e2ae3e.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 是 CLI-only 模式，即使 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 也不会启动 Elnis HTTP runtime；
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:fc9a2a279e2ae3e.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ is CLI-only mode; even with __ELBOT_CODE_1__, the Elnis HTTP runtime will not start;

docs/elnis-usage.md:list:fd9d46e2a018693.source: token 与 Provider/Elnis 一样，优先读系统环境变量，再读配置目录 __ELBOT_CODE_0__。
docs/elnis-usage.md:list:fd9d46e2a018693.translation: Similar to Provider/Elnis, the token is read from system environment variables first, and then from the configuration directory __ELBOT_CODE_0__.

docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:001e68adb3.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 同时保存 CLI 服务端和客户端配置。
docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:001e68adb3.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ saves both CLI server and client configurations.

docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:01132ca445.source: 后台 LLM 处理事件后，__ELBOT_CODE_0__ 的 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 可附带图片/文件路径，Elnis 会在报告发送时一并投递。
docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:01132ca445.translation: After the background LLM processes the event, the __ELBOT_CODE_1__ of __ELBOT_CODE_0__ can include image/file paths, which Elnis will deliver together when the report is sent.

docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:143cb8eb95.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 必须是当前任务工作目录内的相对路径，不能使用绝对路径、__ELBOT_CODE_1__ 或 __ELBOT_CODE_2__。
docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:143cb8eb95.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ must be a relative path within the current task working directory; absolute paths, __ELBOT_CODE_1__, or __ELBOT_CODE_2__ cannot be used.

docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:164dc12a20.source: HTTP 响应只表示 Elnis 已接收或拒绝请求，不等待 LLM 完成。
docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:164dc12a20.translation: The HTTP response only indicates that Elnis has received or rejected the request, and does not wait for the LLM to complete.

docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:1f7cad2a0b.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 为空时行为不变，非空时优先 segments 渲染，content 作为附加文本。
docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:1f7cad2a0b.translation: Behavior remains unchanged when __ELBOT_CODE_0__ is empty; when not empty, segments are rendered preferentially, and content serves as additional text.

docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:24ba7ec8ce.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 是当前 ElBot 作为服务端时读取的配置，__ELBOT_CODE_1__ 是当前命令作为 CLI 客户端连接服务端时读取的配置。
docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:24ba7ec8ce.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ is the configuration read when ElBot acts as the server, and __ELBOT_CODE_1__ is the configuration read when the current command connects to the server as a CLI client.

docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:2eb6f56894.source: Elvena v2 支持通过 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 字段发送图片和文件。__ELBOT_CODE_1__ 保留为纯文本 fallback，与旧 Elwisp 完全兼容。
docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:2eb6f56894.translation: Elvena v2 supports sending images and files via the __ELBOT_CODE_0__ field. __ELBOT_CODE_1__ is reserved as a plain text fallback and is fully compatible with the old Elwisp.

docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:3992a8029e.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 会提供协议说明、配置片段、事件模板、代码脚手架和测试命令；真正写文件或运行命令仍会继续使用对应工具。
docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:3992a8029e.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ will provide protocol descriptions, configuration snippets, event templates, code scaffolding, and test commands; actually writing files or running commands will still continue to use the corresponding tools.

docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:3a19b861be.translation: Currently, it is recommended to only use:

docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:3b1511c0ed.source: 命中 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 或单 Elwisp __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 时才禁止。
docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:3b1511c0ed.translation: It is only prohibited when __ELBOT_CODE_0__ or a single Elwisp __ELBOT_CODE_1__ is hit.

docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:4624f2dadc.source: Elnis 仍会结合全局配置、Elwisp 配置和平台可用性计算最终目标。
docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:4624f2dadc.translation: Elnis will still calculate the final target based on global configuration, Elwisp configuration, and platform availability.

docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:4bf13d0ac5.source: 后台 LLM 处理事件后，__ELBOT_CODE_0__ 的 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 可附带图片/文件路径，Elnis 会在报告发送时一并投递。
docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:4bf13d0ac5.translation: After the background LLM processes an event, the __ELBOT_CODE_1__ of __ELBOT_CODE_0__ can include image/file paths, which Elnis will deliver together when the report is sent.

docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:4bf90b5417.source: Elnis 默认关闭。启用时先在 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 中声明配置文件入口：
docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:4bf90b5417.translation: Elnis is disabled by default. When enabling it, first declare the configuration file entry in __ELBOT_CODE_0__:

docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:5a9b0b9287.source: 本文承接 [Elnis 监听枢纽](elnis.md)，讲如何启用 Elnis、配置 Elwisp 策略，并用 Elvena 投递事件。
docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:5a9b0b9287.translation: This article follows [Elnis listening hub](elnis.md) and explains how to enable Elnis, configure Elwisp policies, and use Elvena to deliver events.

docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:69507ad87d.source: Elnis 默认关闭。启用时在 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 中配置：
docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:69507ad87d.translation: Elnis is disabled by default. To enable it, configure it in __ELBOT_CODE_0__:

docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:6bedfd1be3.source: 如果想让 ElBot 帮你生成 Elwisp 监听器，可以在 work 模式下向超级管理员会话提出需求，例如：
docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:6bedfd1be3.translation: If you want ElBot to help you generate an Elwisp listener, you can submit a request to the superadmin Session in work mode, for example:

docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:74d9bfb1c1.source: 禁用配置中的 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 表示禁用该平台所有投递。
docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:74d9bfb1c1.translation: Setting __ELBOT_CODE_0__ in the disable configuration means disabling all deliveries for this platform.

docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:a0c0277789.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 可以包含 __ELBOT_CODE_1__，表示请求投递到 Elnis 策略允许的全部平台。
docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:a0c0277789.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ can contain __ELBOT_CODE_1__, indicating that the request is delivered to all platforms allowed by the Elnis policy.

docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:a8dc934328.source: Elwisp 可以在 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 中声明期望目标，但最终目标由 Elnis 裁决。
docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:a8dc934328.translation: Elwisp can declare the expected target in __ELBOT_CODE_0__, but the final target is decided by Elnis.

docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:bbededb64a.source: Elvena v1 支持通过 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 字段发送图片和文件。__ELBOT_CODE_1__ 保留为纯文本 fallback，与旧 Elwisp 完全兼容。
docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:bbededb64a.translation: Elvena v1 supports sending images and files via the __ELBOT_CODE_0__ field. __ELBOT_CODE_1__ is retained as a plain text fallback, fully compatible with the old Elwisp.

docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:c27cc1f6d3.source: 如果同一个 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 再次发送，Elnis 会返回 duplicate，不重复分发。
docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:c27cc1f6d3.translation: If the same __ELBOT_CODE_0__ is sent again, Elnis will return duplicate and will not redistribute it.

docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:ddac502e5a.source: 启动 ElBot 后，可以用 curl 测试一个 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 事件：
docs/elnis-usage.md:paragraph:ddac502e5a.translation: After starting ElBot, you can use curl to test a __ELBOT_CODE_0__ event:

docs/elnis-usage.md:quote:d15d6054f2b4a4.source: **注：**：Elvena 基于 JSON，内容必须使用 UTF-8 编码。
docs/elnis-usage.md:quote:d15d6054f2b4a4.translation: **Note:** Elvena is based on JSON, and the content must be UTF-8 encoded.

docs/elnis-usage.md:table:0250510547f02d.source: Elnis LLM 模型槽位，仅支持 __ELBOT_CODE_0__、__ELBOT_CODE_1__、__ELBOT_CODE_2__；未填写或对应槽位未配置时回退到 __ELBOT_CODE_3__。
docs/elnis-usage.md:table:0250510547f02d.translation: Elnis LLM model slot, only supporting __ELBOT_CODE_0__, __ELBOT_CODE_1__, and __ELBOT_CODE_2__; if left blank or the corresponding slot is not configured, it will fall back to __ELBOT_CODE_3__.

docs/elnis-usage.md:table:045a16d4324315.translation: The final decision is still made by Elnis.

docs/elnis-usage.md:table:05a363aa4f244a.translation: Specific event source, such as service name, script name, or RSS name.

docs/elnis-usage.md:table:0e88874c152f1e.source: Elwisp 名称，也是来源身份之一；仅允许英文字母、数字、__ELBOT_CODE_0__、__ELBOT_CODE_1__，不允许点号。

docs/elnis-usage.md:table:2da44f750570a9.translation: Elwisp tag, used for logs and statistics.

docs/elnis-usage.md:table:516544f0c088ba.translation: ElBot tool name preloaded for background tasks; __ELBOT_CODE_0__ will be ignored.

docs/elnis-usage.md:table:5987659b238c1f.translation: Elwisp name, which is also one of the source identities.

docs/elnis-usage.md:table:5b40a5e36cd735.translation: Event body. For LLM mode, using ELyph Task Notation __ELBOT_CODE_0__ is recommended.

docs/elnis-usage.md:table:6a72a3285b0a6b.translation: The ElBot internal tool name or Skill name preloaded for background tasks;

docs/elnis-usage.md:table:7089fc7221c896.translation: Ordinary tools inject the schema, while Skills inject task descriptions and automatically inject the corresponding runner;

docs/elnis-usage.md:table:79bb2ed09cd5e0.translation: File name, used for downloading, saving, and displaying.

docs/elnis-usage.md:table:7b08217f016550.translation: The delivery target expected by Elwisp; the final decision is still made by Elnis.

docs/elnis-usage.md:table:83a2d771154360.translation: Occurrence time of the external event; the reception time is used if missing.

docs/elnis-usage.md:table:852eac6691046a.translation: Original supplementary data, used only for recording and prompt attachment.

docs/elnis-usage.md:table:9100ffc0032ef1.source: Elwisp 随事件声明的工具。当前仍是开发中能力，不建议依赖。
docs/elnis-usage.md:table:9100ffc0032ef1.translation: Tools declared by Elwisp along with the event. This is currently a capability under development and is not recommended for reliance.

docs/elnis-usage.md:table:a3bb081cc5dfaf.source: 后台任务预加载的 ElBot 内部工具名；必须在 Elnis __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 裁决范围内，__ELBOT_CODE_1__ 会被忽略。
docs/elnis-usage.md:table:a3bb081cc5dfaf.translation: The name of the ElBot internal tool preloaded by the background task; it must be within the adjudication range of Elnis __ELBOT_CODE_0__, and __ELBOT_CODE_1__ will be ignored.

docs/elnis-usage.md:table:b9b16d252007ed.source: 事件标题，用于通知和后台 Session 标题。
docs/elnis-usage.md:table:b9b16d252007ed.translation: Event title, used for notifications and background Session titles.

docs/elnis-usage.md:table:e3b263ee01e2d8.translation: Plain text content, not persisted to disk.

docs/elnis-usage.md:table:e45776f2e59354.source: Elwisp 期望投递目标数组，__ELBOT_CODE_0__ 表示发给平台超级管理员，__ELBOT_CODE_1__ 且带 __ELBOT_CODE_2__ 时发指定私聊/群聊，__ELBOT_CODE_3__ 表示所有已启用平台超级管理员。
docs/elnis-usage.md:table:e45776f2e59354.translation: Elwisp expects a delivery target array: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ indicates sending to the platform superadmin, __ELBOT_CODE_1__ with __ELBOT_CODE_2__ indicates sending to a specified private chat/group chat, and __ELBOT_CODE_3__ indicates all enabled platform superadmins.

docs/elnis-usage.md:table:f094dbde8ffe18.source: 必须在 Elnis __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 裁决范围内，__ELBOT_CODE_1__ 会被忽略。
docs/elnis-usage.md:table:f094dbde8ffe18.translation: Must be within the Elnis __ELBOT_CODE_0__ adjudication range; __ELBOT_CODE_1__ will be ignored.

docs/elnis.md:list:32e2bcfc7bef15132f926.translation: When an RSS feed updates, automatically summarize the content and push it to the target platform.

docs/elnis.md:list:38595f33e6cbe40f297d2.translation: When a server anomaly occurs, let the LLM analyze the logs and determine whether to send a notification.

docs/elnis.md:list:3beb6c84d50392afe4cfd.translation: Execute __ELBOT_CODE_0__, __ELBOT_CODE_1__, or __ELBOT_CODE_2__ according to the event mode.

docs/elnis.md:list:4d90c584b8f13fb9af4c6.translation: Devices, sensors, or local script outputs.

docs/elnis.md:list:560a2987aa48ec7c07051.translation: When a local script detects a state change, send the result to ElBot instead of sending messages haphazardly.

docs/elnis.md:list:6df7762b9632af6fb51e7.translation: When a game server generates an event, let ElBot record it, send a notification, or execute background tasks.

docs/elnis.md:list:756840f53fd4b284f4f20.translation: Record Elnis logs and audit information.

docs/elnis.md:list:aaa581372e5ecd5fda5a5.translation: Decide which platforms events can be delivered to.

docs/elnis.md:list:ba33d5e79f175e2f0e007.source: Elwisp 随事件声明工具并由 Elnis 安全调用。
docs/elnis.md:list:ba33d5e79f175e2f0e007.translation: Elwisp declares tools along with events and is called securely by Elnis.

docs/elnis.md:list:bd9e5e4de631eeb8a5e38.translation: When a Webhook receives a business alert, pass it to ElBot first to determine the severity.

docs/elnis.md:list:cfbd74b6dad5bfea573ce.translation: Any content that a computer can receive, read, listen to, or generate.

docs/elnis.md:list:dcbbedb1f1e172a416df8.translation: Elnis event querying, failure retry, or disabling capabilities.

docs/elnis.md:list:de069db686cee81db9114.translation: Built-in Skills or tools for "creating Elwisp".

docs/elnis.md:list:fbda849eb7228a035909a.translation: Multi-turn communication between Elnis and Elwisp.

docs/elnis.md:paragraph:0347a4bb23fc5973.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 模式的 HTTP 请求会快速返回，实际处理由后台 worker 执行。LLM 最终需要返回结构化结果：
docs/elnis.md:paragraph:0347a4bb23fc5973.translation: HTTP requests in __ELBOT_CODE_0__ mode will return quickly, and the actual processing is executed by a background worker. The LLM eventually needs to return a structured result:

docs/elnis.md:paragraph:0927439e61f32efc.source: 它观察的“世界”不限定类型，包括但不限于：
docs/elnis.md:paragraph:0927439e61f32efc.translation: The "world" it observes is not limited by type, including but not limited to:

docs/elnis.md:paragraph:11bcb140fc54cdf3.source: Elnis 不是普通聊天平台，也不实现 PlatformAdapter。
docs/elnis.md:paragraph:11bcb140fc54cdf3.translation: Elnis is not an ordinary chat platform, nor does it implement PlatformAdapter.

docs/elnis.md:paragraph:1306daf10aa549ad.source: Elvena 是 Elwisp 向 Elnis 投递事件的 JSON over HTTP 协议。
docs/elnis.md:paragraph:1306daf10aa549ad.translation: Elvena is the JSON over HTTP protocol used by Elwisp to deliver events to Elnis.

docs/elnis.md:paragraph:1588d1f607689f56.source: 它读取 __ELBOT_CODE_0__，支持按 Elwisp 名称、事件来源、事件 ID、模式和时间范围过滤。
docs/elnis.md:paragraph:1588d1f607689f56.translation: It reads __ELBOT_CODE_0__ and supports filtering by Elwisp name, event source, event ID, mode, and time range.

docs/elnis.md:paragraph:2bc3b5bba831d8de.source: 以下能力仍在开发或规划中：
docs/elnis.md:paragraph:2bc3b5bba831d8de.translation: The following capabilities are still under development or planning:

docs/elnis.md:paragraph:2d715a6c4fb79cb2.source: 外部事件不能绕过 Agent、Tool Runtime、Security Policy 和 Output Layer。
docs/elnis.md:paragraph:2d715a6c4fb79cb2.translation: External events cannot bypass the Agent, Tool Runtime, Security Policy, and Output Layer.

docs/elnis.md:paragraph:34b5a3148b8753f6.source: Elnis 收到事件后，会按 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 决定处理方式。
docs/elnis.md:paragraph:34b5a3148b8753f6.translation: After receiving an event, Elnis determines the processing method according to __ELBOT_CODE_0__.

docs/elnis.md:paragraph:3b4147c19d3df861.source: 普通聊天机器人通常只会响应用户消息。Cron 可以响应时间，但不知道外部世界发生了什么。
docs/elnis.md:paragraph:3b4147c19d3df861.translation: Ordinary chatbots usually only respond to user messages. Cron can respond to time, but it doesn't know what is happening in the outside world.

docs/elnis.md:paragraph:3f24d1d9a69f0930.source: 当前 Elnis 已支持 record、direct、llm 模式、Elwisp 随事件声明外部工具以及多模态消息段（text/image/file）。
docs/elnis.md:paragraph:3f24d1d9a69f0930.translation: Currently, Elnis supports record, direct, and llm modes, Elwisp declaring external tools with events, and multimodal message segments (text/image/file).

docs/elnis.md:paragraph:45c5931b1d976a6f.source: Elnis 是 ElBot 的事件监听枢纽。它像一颗恒星，接住来自各处 Elwisp 群星的信号，再由 ElBot 决定是否记录、通知、分析或执行后台任务。
docs/elnis.md:paragraph:45c5931b1d976a6f.translation: Elnis is the event listening hub of ElBot. Like a star, it catches signals from the constellation of Elwisps, and ElBot then decides whether to record, notify, analyze, or execute background tasks.

docs/elnis.md:paragraph:45c5a49b04ad6e8a.source: 它统一接收外部事件，把事件接到记录、通知或后台 LLM；它像一颗恒星，所有 Elwisp 的信号都围绕它汇聚，但最终能量由 ElBot 控制。
docs/elnis.md:paragraph:45c5a49b04ad6e8a.translation: It uniformly receives external events and routes them to logs, notifications, or the background LLM; it is like a star around which all Elwisp signals converge, but the ultimate energy is controlled by ElBot.

docs/elnis.md:paragraph:47e7546b41374642.source: 看完这里，就可以开始了解配置和投递事件。
docs/elnis.md:paragraph:47e7546b41374642.translation: After reading this, you can start learning about configuration and delivering events.

docs/elnis.md:paragraph:54824c2593c9b021.source: 它统一接收外部事件，把事件接到记录、通知或后台 LLM；也像恒星，所有 Elwisp 的信号都围绕它汇聚，但最终能量由 ElBot 控制。
docs/elnis.md:paragraph:54824c2593c9b021.translation: It uniformly receives external events and routes them to logs, notifications, or the background LLM; like a star, all signals from Elwisp converge around it, but the final energy is controlled by ElBot.

docs/elnis.md:paragraph:553a11fc1053ba21.source: 工作模式下，超级管理员可以让 ElBot 使用内置工具 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 辅助创建 Elwisp。
docs/elnis.md:paragraph:553a11fc1053ba21.translation: In work mode, the superadmin can let ElBot use the built-in tool __ELBOT_CODE_0__ to assist in creating Elwisp.

docs/elnis.md:paragraph:695148bdd3a5cccf.source: 该工具会返回创建指南、Elvena 事件模板、Elnis 配置片段、监听器脚手架、curl 测试命令和安全检查清单；
docs/elnis.md:paragraph:695148bdd3a5cccf.translation: This tool returns creation guides, Elvena event templates, Elnis configuration snippets, listener scaffolds, curl test commands, and security checklists;

docs/elnis.md:paragraph:7ff9d0ef9e57e4c6.source: 简单说，Elnis 把 ElBot 从“等用户说话的机器人”扩展成“能感知外部世界的 Agent 枢纽”。
docs/elnis.md:paragraph:7ff9d0ef9e57e4c6.translation: Simply put, Elnis expands ElBot from a "bot that waits for users to speak" into an "Agent hub capable of perceiving the external world."

docs/elnis.md:paragraph:96d4257f00bcf65b.source: Elwisp 像散布在外部世界的探机，也像 ElBot 的眼睛。它们可以很多、很小、很分散；职责只有一个：把外部世界发生了什么告诉 Elnis。
docs/elnis.md:paragraph:96d4257f00bcf65b.translation: Elwisp is like a probe scattered across the external world, and also like the eyes of ElBot. They can be numerous, small, and dispersed; they have only one responsibility: to tell Elnis what is happening in the external world.

docs/elnis.md:paragraph:9986537e133dc0f6.source: 真正写文件或运行命令仍由文件工具和 shell 工具处理。
docs/elnis.md:paragraph:9986537e133dc0f6.translation: The actual writing of files or execution of commands is still handled by the file tool and shell tool.

docs/elnis.md:paragraph:aaea27431774bcd2.source: 可以用 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 查看 Elnis/Elwisp 事件日志。
docs/elnis.md:paragraph:aaea27431774bcd2.translation: You can use __ELBOT_CODE_0__ to view Elnis/Elwisp event logs.

docs/elnis.md:paragraph:adef3d9013f4f87c.source: Elnis 让 ElBot 可以响应外部世界。
docs/elnis.md:paragraph:adef3d9013f4f87c.translation: Elnis allows ElBot to respond to the external world.

docs/elnis.md:paragraph:afa7d04616c71399.source: 超级管理员在平台里引用回复 Elnis LLM 报告通知时，会自动 resume 到对应后台 Session 继续对话；
docs/elnis.md:paragraph:afa7d04616c71399.translation: When a superadmin quotes and replies to an Elnis LLM report notification within the platform, it will automatically resume to the corresponding background Session to continue the conversation;

docs/elnis.md:paragraph:b3a11302390f0fe1.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 时，Elnis 会按裁决后的目标发送 __ELBOT_CODE_1__。
docs/elnis.md:paragraph:b3a11302390f0fe1.translation: During __ELBOT_CODE_0__, Elnis will send __ELBOT_CODE_1__ according to the adjudicated target.

docs/elnis.md:paragraph:b6a7786f7bade05c.source: 如需参考现成的 Elwisp 示例、协议文档和模板，可查看 [Elwisp Showcase](https://github.com/Elfreese/elwisp-showcase)。
docs/elnis.md:paragraph:b6a7786f7bade05c.translation: For ready-made Elwisp examples, protocol documentation, and templates, please refer to [Elwisp Showcase](https://github.com/Elfreese/elwisp-showcase).

docs/elnis.md:paragraph:be686882804206dc.source: 普通用户引用时只会作为普通引用文本处理。
docs/elnis.md:paragraph:be686882804206dc.translation: When a regular user quotes it, it will only be processed as ordinary quoted text.

docs/elnis.md:paragraph:c8678c2e8de57719.source: 当前 Elnis 已支持 record、direct 和 llm 模式。以下能力仍在开发或规划中：
docs/elnis.md:paragraph:c8678c2e8de57719.translation: Currently, Elnis supports record, direct, and llm modes. The following capabilities are still under development or planning:

docs/elnis.md:paragraph:cf774143d47dd2b4.source: 简单说：Cron 负责“什么时候做”，Elnis 负责“外面发生了什么”，ELyph 负责“任务怎么描述”，Skill 负责“能力怎么复用”。
docs/elnis.md:paragraph:cf774143d47dd2b4.translation: Simply put: Cron is responsible for "when to do it", Elnis is responsible for "what happened outside", ELyph is responsible for "how the task is described", and Skill is responsible for "how capabilities are reused".

docs/elnis.md:paragraph:d1d703d1c38cf406.source: Elwisp 只负责“看见并上报”。它不直接控制 ElBot，不直接向聊天平台发消息，也不决定最终是否调用 LLM 或工具。
docs/elnis.md:paragraph:d1d703d1c38cf406.translation: Elwisp is only responsible for "seeing and reporting." It does not directly control ElBot, does not send messages directly to chat platforms, and does not decide whether to ultimately call an LLM or a tool.

docs/elnis.md:paragraph:d706f949eac50f5b.source: 它可以是一个 shell 脚本、一个常驻进程、一个 RSS 轮询器、一个 Webhook 转发器、一个游戏服务器插件、一个日志监听器、一个硬件状态采集器，或者任何能把外部信号转换成 HTTP JSON 的程序。
docs/elnis.md:paragraph:d706f949eac50f5b.translation: It can be a shell script, a resident process, an RSS poller, a Webhook forwarder, a game server plugin, a log listener, a hardware status collector, or any program that can convert external signals into HTTP JSON.

docs/elnis.md:paragraph:d9720267703ebc0d.source: Elnis 是 ElBot 内部的事件入口 runtime，和平台 runtime、Cron runtime 同级装配。
docs/elnis.md:paragraph:d9720267703ebc0d.translation: Elnis is the event entry runtime within ElBot, assembled at the same level as the platform runtime and Cron runtime.

docs/elnis.md:paragraph:e4dca4da13020e3b.source: 它负责把“外面发生了什么”变成 Elnis 能理解的统一事件：来源是谁、事件 ID 是什么、内容是什么、希望怎么处理、希望投递到哪里。
docs/elnis.md:paragraph:e4dca4da13020e3b.translation: It is responsible for turning "what happened outside" into a unified event that Elnis can understand: who the source is, what the event ID is, what the content is, how it should be handled, and where it should be delivered.

docs/elnis.md:paragraph:e977c070f63dd3f5.source: 当前 Elnis 已支持 record、direct、llm 模式和 Elwisp 随事件声明外部工具。以下能力仍在开发或规划中：
docs/elnis.md:paragraph:e977c070f63dd3f5.translation: Currently, Elnis supports record, direct, and llm modes, as well as Elwisp declaring external tools along with events. The following capabilities are still under development or planning:

docs/elnis.md:paragraph:fc6b6e2ffe62b78a.source: Elwisp 是 ElBot 的眼睛，也像散布在外部世界的探机。它们可以很多、很小、很分散；职责只有一个：把外部世界发生了什么告诉 Elnis。
docs/elnis.md:paragraph:fc6b6e2ffe62b78a.translation: Elwisp is the eyes of ElBot, acting like probes scattered across the external world. They can be numerous, small, and dispersed; they have only one responsibility: to tell Elnis what is happening in the external world.

docs/elnis.md:table:0d10bce254de0e08e7f7.source: 只记录事件，不调用 LLM，不发送通知。
docs/elnis.md:table:0d10bce254de0e08e7f7.translation: Only record events, without calling the LLM or sending notifications.

docs/elnis.md:table:404cb10b9e27a2147574.source: 事件归档、接入测试、低优先级信号。
docs/elnis.md:table:404cb10b9e27a2147574.translation: Event archiving, integration testing, low-priority signals.

docs/elnis.md:table:81a4460ccdd5cc2ca998.source: 把经验或代码沉淀成可被发现和调用的能力。
docs/elnis.md:table:81a4460ccdd5cc2ca998.translation: Condense experience or code into discoverable and callable capabilities.

docs/elnis.md:table:888118643ee068b3ed0c.source: 简单告警、外部系统已生成可读消息。
docs/elnis.md:table:888118643ee068b3ed0c.translation: Simple alerts, readable messages already generated by external systems.

docs/elnis.md:table:8a0298b8b0a2b35618de.source: 到点执行 direct 或 LLM 任务。
docs/elnis.md:table:8a0298b8b0a2b35618de.translation: Execute direct or LLM tasks when the time is reached.

docs/elnis.md:table:91b6cecc8edcbd2a2970.source: 接收 Elwisp 投递的事件并分发处理。
docs/elnis.md:table:91b6cecc8edcbd2a2970.translation: Receive events delivered by Elwisp and distribute them for processing.

docs/elnis.md:table:99eefee9100ef3a2b30a.source: 需要分析、归纳、判断或使用工具的事件。
docs/elnis.md:table:99eefee9100ef3a2b30a.translation: Events that require analysis, induction, judgment, or the use of tools.

docs/elnis.md:table:b05ff7fb0d07327ad2bf.source: 进入后台 LLM Session，由模型分析后决定是否报告。
docs/elnis.md:table:b05ff7fb0d07327ad2bf.translation: Enters a background LLM Session, where the model analyzes it to decide whether to report.

docs/elnis.md:table:e1fa708a3c46e2d9bf85.source: 用结构化方式描述任务、步骤和约束。
docs/elnis.md:table:e1fa708a3c46e2d9bf85.translation: Describe tasks, steps, and constraints in a structured manner.

docs/elnis.md:table:f65dfca21fa9f0474ec6.source: 按 Elnis 裁决后的目标直接发送文本通知。
docs/elnis.md:table:f65dfca21fa9f0474ec6.translation: Directly send text notifications to the target determined by Elnis.

docs/elyph.md:heading:df6f58273bc97f8907.source: 示例二：多城市天气查询

docs/elyph.md:list:1ebc5d1035cad30fba0bc.source: 空行和 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 开头的注释行会被忽略。
docs/elyph.md:list:1ebc5d1035cad30fba0bc.translation: Empty lines and comment lines starting with __ELBOT_CODE_0__ will be ignored.

docs/elyph.md:list:1fc205852ac12938a9f95.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ indicates that this input is required.

docs/elyph.md:list:2c92935a5ec82d1b95a5a.translation: No marker indicates a regular input.

docs/elyph.md:list:2f951aa30a493be98b738.source: 如果同一 AgentSkill 同时存在 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 和 __ELBOT_CODE_1__，ELyph 文件的描述会优先被 Agent 使用。
docs/elyph.md:list:2f951aa30a493be98b738.translation: If the same AgentSkill has both __ELBOT_CODE_0__ and __ELBOT_CODE_1__, the description in the ELyph file will be prioritized for use by the Agent.

docs/elyph.md:list:3e7a9b86d568729eea4ef.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ indicates that this input is optional.

docs/elyph.md:list:41b81e5f8305e4ce753bd.source: Go Skill 放在 __ELBOT_CODE_0__，必须使用 __ELBOT_CODE_1__，可选 Go 二进制用于执行。
docs/elyph.md:list:41b81e5f8305e4ce753bd.translation: Go Skill is placed in __ELBOT_CODE_0__, must use __ELBOT_CODE_1__, and an optional Go binary can be used for execution.

docs/elyph.md:list:4589028e0f75527c8a0e6.source: 变量以 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 开头，后跟字母、数字或下划线。
docs/elyph.md:list:4589028e0f75527c8a0e6.translation: Variables start with __ELBOT_CODE_0__, followed by letters, numbers, or underscores.

docs/elyph.md:list:5ac1ceb3f06e794becb14.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__: A short natural language description, optional.

docs/elyph.md:list:5d8ca3035260b3ed3a7fc.source: 循环内可以调用 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 或 __ELBOT_CODE_1__。
docs/elyph.md:list:5d8ca3035260b3ed3a7fc.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ or __ELBOT_CODE_1__ can be called within the loop.

docs/elyph.md:list:687c4a569b138cd248804.source: **复用性差**：每次都要重新描述相似流程，写法可能不一致。
docs/elyph.md:list:687c4a569b138cd248804.translation: **Poor reusability**: Similar processes must be described every time, and the wording may be inconsistent.

docs/elyph.md:list:6c2f946bf772ab80bee89.source: 条件用自然语言或引用变量，由 LLM 在执行时理解。
docs/elyph.md:list:6c2f946bf772ab80bee89.translation: Conditions are written in natural language or by referencing variables, which are understood by the LLM during execution.

docs/elyph.md:list:6c464eb20cb270c19aadf.source: **歧义多**：同一句话可能被理解成不同步骤。
docs/elyph.md:list:6c464eb20cb270c19aadf.translation: **High ambiguity**: The same sentence may be interpreted as different steps.

docs/elyph.md:list:72179fd69b6f8d1d81f3e.source: Skill 的 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 文件使用 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ header。
docs/elyph.md:list:72179fd69b6f8d1d81f3e.translation: The __ELBOT_CODE_0__ file of a Skill uses the __ELBOT_CODE_1__ header.

docs/elyph.md:list:7664f2501282f96284ad9.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__：小写字母开头，只能包含小写字母、数字、__ELBOT_CODE_1__ 和 __ELBOT_CODE_2__，最长 64 字符。
docs/elyph.md:list:7664f2501282f96284ad9.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__: Starts with a lowercase letter and can only contain lowercase letters, numbers, __ELBOT_CODE_1__, and __ELBOT_CODE_2__, with a maximum length of 64 characters.

docs/elyph.md:list:77d827aff2bf1c8ea61b1.source: AgentSkill 放在 __ELBOT_CODE_0__，可用 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 覆写 __ELBOT_CODE_2__ 的 Agent 可读说明。
docs/elyph.md:list:77d827aff2bf1c8ea61b1.translation: AgentSkill is placed in __ELBOT_CODE_0__, and __ELBOT_CODE_1__ can be used to override the Agent-readable description of __ELBOT_CODE_2__.

docs/elyph.md:list:90a4417aaa7065b42aaa1.source: 非空行必须以合法的 ELyph token 开头。
docs/elyph.md:list:90a4417aaa7065b42aaa1.translation: Non-empty lines must start with a valid ELyph token.

docs/elyph.md:list:9871d602368a8a49574df.source: 类型标注用 __ELBOT_CODE_0__，类型名同变量命名规则。
docs/elyph.md:list:9871d602368a8a49574df.translation: Type annotations use __ELBOT_CODE_0__, and type names follow the same naming rules as variables.

docs/elyph.md:list:bedb46a901046f0c51ea9.source: 代码块用 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 开始，__ELBOT_CODE_1__ 独占一行结束。
docs/elyph.md:list:bedb46a901046f0c51ea9.translation: Code blocks start with __ELBOT_CODE_0__ and end with __ELBOT_CODE_1__ on a line by itself.

docs/elyph.md:list:eec5fc5aa3a7673f0e553.source: **上下文长**：用自然语言把步骤、分支、约束写清楚需要大量文字。
docs/elyph.md:list:eec5fc5aa3a7673f0e553.translation: **Long context**: Using natural language to clearly describe steps, branches, and constraints requires a large amount of text.

docs/elyph.md:list:fd64bf549fea3a76e0ea8.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 必须紧跟 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 块的 __ELBOT_CODE_2__ 之后。
docs/elyph.md:list:fd64bf549fea3a76e0ea8.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ must immediately follow the __ELBOT_CODE_2__ of the __ELBOT_CODE_1__ block.

docs/elyph.md:paragraph:0e0beef488830232.source: 自然语言描述任务虽然灵活，但在以下场景存在明显弱点：
docs/elyph.md:paragraph:0e0beef488830232.translation: While describing tasks in natural language is flexible, it has obvious weaknesses in the following scenarios:

docs/elyph.md:paragraph:0ef03f65aaf01d4b.translation: Assign a value to a variable.

docs/elyph.md:paragraph:117ce9d7a497a57a.source: 参数使用 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 格式，多个参数用 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 分隔。
docs/elyph.md:paragraph:117ce9d7a497a57a.translation: Parameters use the __ELBOT_CODE_0__ format, and multiple parameters are separated by __ELBOT_CODE_1__.

docs/elyph.md:paragraph:28c7f01a7d1db0df.source: 声明任务需要接收的输入。
docs/elyph.md:paragraph:28c7f01a7d1db0df.translation: Declare the input that the task needs to receive.

docs/elyph.md:paragraph:2d60fe68e4deddeb.source: ELyph 用固定的语法替代冗长的自然语言说明，让任务描述更短、更稳定、更可预测。
docs/elyph.md:paragraph:2d60fe68e4deddeb.translation: ELyph replaces verbose natural language descriptions with a fixed syntax, making task descriptions shorter, more stable, and more predictable.

docs/elyph.md:paragraph:3ef359032b503376.source: 文档的第一条有效语句必须是 header，且只能出现一次。
docs/elyph.md:paragraph:3ef359032b503376.translation: The first valid statement of the document must be a header, and it can only appear once.

docs/elyph.md:paragraph:3f0998a646208c79.source: **保留变量**：__ELBOT_CODE_0__ 和 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 不能被重新赋值。

docs/elyph.md:paragraph:432e1f471712f13b.source: 写出任务执行时需要遵守的约束条件。内容使用肯定形式。
docs/elyph.md:paragraph:432e1f471712f13b.translation: Specify the constraints that must be followed during task execution. Content should be written in affirmative form.

docs/elyph.md:paragraph:454b2684213f283c.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 运算符按左侧类型决定行为：__ELBOT_CODE_1__/__ELBOT_CODE_2__ 类型做数值相加，__ELBOT_CODE_3__ 类型做字符串拼接。
docs/elyph.md:paragraph:454b2684213f283c.translation: The __ELBOT_CODE_0__ operator determines its behavior based on the type of the left operand: __ELBOT_CODE_1__/__ELBOT_CODE_2__ types perform numeric addition, while __ELBOT_CODE_3__ types perform string concatenation.

docs/elyph.md:paragraph:607f367f664f7802.translation: Declare the output produced by the task.

docs/elyph.md:paragraph:62eca756c22d3e4e.source: ELyph（ELYph Task Notation）是 ElBot 的轻量任务表示法。
docs/elyph.md:paragraph:62eca756c22d3e4e.translation: ELyph (ELyph Task Notation) is ElBot's lightweight task notation.

docs/elyph.md:paragraph:6c02a9131d407c50.source: 三元表达式的三个部分都不能为空，条件部分通常引用上一步工具调用的结果。
docs/elyph.md:paragraph:6c02a9131d407c50.translation: All three parts of a ternary expression must be non-empty; the condition part typically references the result of the previous tool call.

docs/elyph.md:paragraph:71e16561324de2ee.source: 写出任务执行时不能做的事。内容不使用否定形式，直接描述禁止的行为本身。
docs/elyph.md:paragraph:71e16561324de2ee.translation: Specify things that must not be done during task execution. Do not use negative forms; describe the forbidden behavior directly.

docs/elyph.md:paragraph:7319979ebc385888.source: ELyph 当前是 v0.2，语法可能在未来版本中扩展。写 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 或任务条时，建议保持结构简洁，避免依赖未在本文档中列出的实验性写法。
docs/elyph.md:paragraph:7319979ebc385888.translation: ELyph is currently v0.2, and the syntax may be expanded in future versions. When writing __ELBOT_CODE_0__ or task entries, it is recommended to keep the structure concise and avoid relying on experimental notations not listed in this document.

docs/elyph.md:paragraph:94eb0a10c3bb71d8.source: 它的目标是用简短、稳定的结构化语法描述任务的输入、输出、步骤、条件和约束，减少自然语言任务描述的歧义，同时人类易读。
docs/elyph.md:paragraph:94eb0a10c3bb71d8.translation: Its goal is to describe the input, output, steps, conditions, and constraints of a task using a short, stable, and structured syntax, reducing the ambiguity of natural language task descriptions while remaining human-readable.

docs/elyph.md:paragraph:97162150f9e815fa.source: 更多 skill 管理操作见 [命令速查](commands.md) 的 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 部分。
docs/elyph.md:paragraph:97162150f9e815fa.translation: For more Skill management operations, see the __ELBOT_CODE_0__ section of [Command Quick Reference](commands.md).

docs/elyph.md:paragraph:c7ad2d1f9f6ba7f5.source: LLM Cron 任务可以用 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ header 写任务条，语法与 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 完全相同。
docs/elyph.md:paragraph:c7ad2d1f9f6ba7f5.translation: LLM Cron tasks can use the __ELBOT_CODE_0__ header to write task entries, and the syntax is identical to __ELBOT_CODE_1__.

docs/elyph.md:paragraph:dbf982d246ad7277.source: 用表达式推导变量值，支持三元条件。
docs/elyph.md:paragraph:dbf982d246ad7277.translation: Derive variable values using expressions, with support for ternary conditions.

docs/elyph.md:paragraph:e10e108960c3c266.translation: Full-line comment, which will be ignored.

docs/elyph.md:paragraph:e866f8f5c766ee21.source: 调用 ElBot 工具或子 skill。
docs/elyph.md:paragraph:e866f8f5c766ee21.translation: Call an ElBot tool or sub-skill.

docs/elyph.md:paragraph:eea315ab512eeab6.source: 结束一个代码块，独占一行。
docs/elyph.md:paragraph:eea315ab512eeab6.translation: Ends a code block, occupying its own line.

docs/elyph.md:paragraph:f857d7d7b952ee1f.source: Cron 按计划驱动 LLM 执行任务条中的步骤，并使用指定的工具。
docs/elyph.md:paragraph:f857d7d7b952ee1f.translation: Cron drives the LLM to execute the steps in the task entry according to a schedule, using the specified tools.

docs/elyph.md:table:63926cf21c9d281bf3c1.source: 外置文档型 Skill；__ELBOT_CODE_0__ 会覆写 Agent 可读说明，__ELBOT_CODE_1__ 兼容 agentskills.io 风格说明。
docs/elyph.md:table:63926cf21c9d281bf3c1.translation: External documentation-based Skill; __ELBOT_CODE_0__ overwrites the Agent-readable description, and __ELBOT_CODE_1__ is compatible with agentskills.io style descriptions.

docs/elyph.md:table:85efd7dae19bc910cc88.source: 在 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 中用 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 头描述后台任务。
docs/elyph.md:table:85efd7dae19bc910cc88.translation: Describe background tasks in __ELBOT_CODE_0__ using the __ELBOT_CODE_1__ header.

docs/elyph.md:table:e36e9fb9e73a692a4260.source: ElBot 原生 Skill；可选 Go 二进制用于执行。
docs/elyph.md:table:e36e9fb9e73a692a4260.translation: ElBot native skill; optional Go binary for execution.

docs/getting-started.md:list:0a7039e0c4d.translation: You can use __ELBOT_CODE_0__ to refresh the model list after starting.

docs/getting-started.md:list:674118ffe7b.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ Switch to work mode where tools can be used.

docs/getting-started.md:list:7616042ea6e.translation: Platform configuration directory, such as Windows __ELBOT_CODE_0__ or Linux XDG configuration directory.

docs/getting-started.md:list:87c2c9b3c32.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ View current Session, model, context, and request status.

docs/getting-started.md:list:87eb2129229.translation: An OpenAI-compatible LLM service, such as DeepSeek, OpenAI, or other services compatible with __ELBOT_CODE_0__.

docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:196b81.translation: To use a temporary configuration file, you can specify it explicitly:

docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:1cd2a6.translation: `default_mode` is set manually; other settings can be configured using commands in the CLI.

docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:254c26.source: 推荐把密钥放在系统环境变量，或放在配置目录下的 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 文件中，不要直接写进 __ELBOT_CODE_1__。
docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:254c26.translation: It is recommended to place keys in system environment variables or in the __ELBOT_CODE_0__ file under the configuration directory, rather than writing them directly into __ELBOT_CODE_1__.

docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:3b938d.source: 编译后的二进制如果找不到平台配置和源码示例配置，会在平台配置目录自动生成 __ELBOT_CODE_0__、__ELBOT_CODE_1__、__ELBOT_CODE_2__、__ELBOT_CODE_3__、__ELBOT_CODE_4__ 和 __ELBOT_CODE_5__。
docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:3b938d.translation: If the compiled binary cannot find the platform configuration or source example configuration, it will automatically generate __ELBOT_CODE_0__, __ELBOT_CODE_1__, __ELBOT_CODE_2__, __ELBOT_CODE_3__, __ELBOT_CODE_4__, and __ELBOT_CODE_5__ in the platform configuration directory.

docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:3e97c8.source: 需要继续历史会话时，可用 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 和 __ELBOT_CODE_1__。
docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:3e97c8.translation: When you need to continue a historical Session, you can use __ELBOT_CODE_0__ and __ELBOT_CODE_1__.

docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:4831bf.source: 运行数据默认进入平台数据目录，例如 SQLite、日志、sandbox 和 artifact。具体规则见 [配置说明](configuration.md)。
docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:4831bf.translation: Runtime data is stored in the platform data directory by default, such as SQLite, logs, sandbox, and artifacts. For detailed rules, see [Configuration Instructions](configuration.md).

docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:4b9566.source: 自动模式下，Linux 如果检测到当前用户已有 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 在运行，会进入本地 CLI-only，避免重复连接平台或重复运行 Cron；
docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:4b9566.translation: In automatic mode, if Linux detects that the current user already has __ELBOT_CODE_0__ running, it will enter local CLI-only mode to avoid duplicate platform connections or duplicate Cron executions;

docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:505a70.source: 直接运行源码时会使用 __ELBOT_CODE_0__；
docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:505a70.translation: When running from source directly, __ELBOT_CODE_0__ will be used;

docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:56825f.translation: Existing configuration files will not be overwritten.

docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:6338ef.translation: Otherwise, it will enter full foreground mode.

docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:677dc5.source: ElBot 默认读取 __ELBOT_CODE_0__，并通过其中的 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 加载 __ELBOT_CODE_2__ 和 __ELBOT_CODE_3__。
docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:677dc5.translation: ElBot reads __ELBOT_CODE_0__ by default, and loads __ELBOT_CODE_2__ and __ELBOT_CODE_3__ via __ELBOT_CODE_1__ within it.

docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:8429e5.translation: Runtime data is stored in the platform data directory by default, such as SQLite, logs, and sandbox. For specific rules, see [Configuration Instructions](configuration.md).

docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:84e2b7.source: 本文档用于把 ElBot 跑起来，并完成第一次 CLI 对话。
docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:84e2b7.translation: This document is used to get ElBot up and running and complete your first CLI conversation.

docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:9b0c11.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 是独立本地进程，会使用同一套配置和 SQLite 数据，但不会接管 service 进程中的当前请求、确认状态或内存里的当前 Session。
docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:9b0c11.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ is an independent local process that uses the same set of configurations and SQLite data, but it will not take over current requests, confirmation states, or the current Session in memory from the service process.

docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:9c7907.translation: The default configuration already includes DeepSeek and OpenAI Providers:

docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:a18886.source: 首次运行且平台配置目录没有 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 时，会在平台配置目录自动生成 __ELBOT_CODE_1__、__ELBOT_CODE_2__、__ELBOT_CODE_3__、__ELBOT_CODE_4__、__ELBOT_CODE_5__ 和 __ELBOT_CODE_6__；
docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:a18886.translation: During the first run, if __ELBOT_CODE_0__ does not exist in the platform configuration directory, __ELBOT_CODE_1__, __ELBOT_CODE_2__, __ELBOT_CODE_3__, __ELBOT_CODE_4__, __ELBOT_CODE_5__, and __ELBOT_CODE_6__ will be automatically generated in the platform configuration directory;

docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:aaa55b.source: 推荐把密钥放在系统环境变量，或把自动生成的 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 复制为配置目录下的 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 后填写，不要直接写进 __ELBOT_CODE_2__。
docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:aaa55b.translation: It is recommended to place the keys in system environment variables, or copy the automatically generated __ELBOT_CODE_0__ to __ELBOT_CODE_1__ in the configuration directory before filling it in; do not write them directly into __ELBOT_CODE_2__.
